### Jack Kruse — 2026-04-24T17:03:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ibogaine-and-5-meo-dmt.32601/post-371964>

The study I'm referring to and pictured below, recently published in **[npj Aging](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41514-025-00244-x)** (2025) by researchers at **Emory University** and **Baylor College of Medicine**, found that psilocin (the metabolite of psilocybin) increased the replicative lifespan of human skin and lung cells by up to **57%**. In aged mice, monthly doses increased the 10-month survival rate from **50% to 80%**, while visibly reducing signs of aging like fur whitening. I'm not into mice studies but this needs to be studied in humans.

While the researchers focused on **SIRT1 expression**, telomere preservation, and reduced oxidative stress, my framework suggests a deeper, subatomic mechanism involving **deuterium depletion** and **melanin biology**.

**Psilocybin as a "Deuterium Filter"**
In my framework, psilocybin is a "power up" because it may solve the **Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE)** problem at the mitochondrial level:

**Mitochondrial Efficiency:** The study noted that psilocybin improves mitochondrial respiratory capacity and ATP production efficiency. In my view, this is because psilocybin-treated cells are better at delivering **deuterium-depleted water** to the ATPase pumps, preventing the "mechanical friction" caused by heavy hydrogen.

**Melanin's Role in Mushrooms:** Many mushrooms use melanin to capture ionizing radiation and convert it into metabolic energy. If psilocybin synthesis is linked to these melanized pathways, the molecule itself might be "pre-depleted" of deuterium, acting as a high-quality **methyl and acetyl donor** that doesn't "stall" enzymes like CYP2C19.

**Solar/Light Mimicry:** Interestingly, the research shows that psilocybin induces gene expression changes in the visual cortex that **closely mirror light-induced changes**, even in total darkness. This suggests psilocybin might act as a "chemical surrogate" for the solar frequencies needed to maintain the **proton tunneling** efficiency of the NF-κB and SIRT1 switches.

**Why Longevity Researchers Missed This**
Mainstream geneticists attribute the 50% lifespan extension to "gene regulation" (SIRT1, p16, p21). However, if the **Inner Mitochondrial Membrane (IMM)** charge is restored by psilocybin’s impact on De-fragging **structured water**, the "genetic" changes are merely the downstream result of a restored **40-million-volt mitochondrial battery**.

Researchers at Emory University and Baylor College of Medicine have discovered that psilocin, the active metabolite of psilocybin, can dramatically delay cellular senescence, the process where cells stop dividing and begin to age. In preclinical trials, human skin cells treated with the compound lived 51% longer, while fetal lung cells saw a staggering 57% increase in lifespan compared to untreated samples. These findings suggest that the impact of psychedelics may extend far beyond the brain, potentially influencing the fundamental biological pathways that govern how our cells resist stress and decay. This sounds like a deuterium story I talked about in the Kruse for Dummies lecture.

**A logical step for future study:** If psilocybin’s benefit is truly about deuterium depletion, we should see a **blue shift in UPEs** (increased coherence) and an increase in the **dielectric constant** of the cellular water following treatment, essentially reversing the "biological brownout."

**CITES**
1\. [https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12322706/](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12322706/)
2\. [https://blogs.bcm.edu/2025/07/22/from-the-labs-can-psychedelic-mushrooms-slow-down-aging/](https://blogs.bcm.edu/2025/07/22/from-the-labs-can-psychedelic-mushrooms-slow-down-aging/)

# Thread: How to watch the sunrise and sunset?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/unread>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 10
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Millerstef — 2026-04-22T01:27:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/post-371758>

Hello. I am brand new here and I have been searching the site for this question because it seemed so basic and surely it would have been discussed. I live in Portland Oregon, 1 hour plus from the ocean, however I am very close to the Willamette River. I am on the East side of it so if I was on the shore facing the river I would be facing west. Is this a fine place to watch the sunrise and sunset? Also, if sunrise is at 6:15 a.m. what time I should I plan to get there. Dawn starts at 5:45. If I can't get down to the river can I just go out to my lawn with my feet in the grass? From my house I don't have a great view of the sky due to all the trees. I would love some guidance in this department if someone doesn't mind sharing how they do sunrise and sunset if they do not have access to the ocean. Thank you.

### MTA321 — 2026-04-22T02:08:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/post-371765>

I wouldn’t over think it that much. Just get outside, have bare feet on the ground and look in the direction of the sun. Even if you have obstructions, the ambient light should be just fine.

### Millerstef — 2026-04-22T02:26:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/post-371768>

> [MTA321 said:](/goto/post?id=371765)
>
> I wouldn’t over think it that much. Just get outside, have bare feet on the ground and look in the direction of the sun. Even if you have obstructions, the ambient light should be just fine.

I appreciate your response. Do you go outside while it is still dark? Just trying to set up my morning to make it happen since sunrise is quite early here. I was hoping for clarity, if sunrise is 6:45 tomorrow is that what time I head out or prior when it is still dusk. Thanks

### MattB99 — 2026-04-22T05:02:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/post-371793>

After watching sunrises for a while I tend to wake up automatically at daybreak. No need to set an alarm. Assuming your bedroom gets natural light.

### digitald3 — 2026-04-22T05:36:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/post-371794>

Don’t over think it. Just get outside with bare feet on the ground sometime before the sunrises and if possible stay out until the UVA rise which is usually about an hour after sunrise. But if you can’t don’t sweat it and maybe take a break at that time and go for a sun break. Mountain, trees, clouds don’t matter

### Mr.AJ — 2026-04-22T16:38:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/post-371835>

I get outside sometime after it is light out but before the sun is visible to me. Not sure if this is exactly optimal but it's working for me.

### Anthony Smith — 2026-04-22T19:27:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/post-371847>

> [Millerstef said:](/goto/post?id=371768)
>
> I appreciate your response. Do you go outside while it is still dark? Just trying to set up my morning to make it happen since sunrise is quite early here. I was hoping for clarity, if sunrise is 6:45 tomorrow is that what time I head out or prior when it is still dusk. Thanks

The problem for most of going out while it is still dark is the artificial light you become exposed to, both in the home and from street light etc.

My personal choice is to be out a few mins before sun rise and stay as long as that days events allow. Avoid ALL artificial light.

### JimBo99 — 2026-04-23T23:03:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/post-371897>

> [Anthony Smith said:](/goto/post?id=371847)
>
> The problem for most of going out while it is still dark is the artificial light you become exposed to, both in the home and from street light etc.
>
> My personal choice is to be out a few mins before sun rise and stay as long as that days events allow. Avoid ALL artificial light.

What are the biophysics behind having early morning artificial light hit the retinas before you receive the natural, unpolarized light at/before sunrise? I thought I remember jack talking about it, but I can't find it.

### Anthony Smith — 2026-04-23T23:11:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/post-371899>

Jack has explained this as only Jack can but I’m not sure of the link. Bottom line though avoid artificial light PM and AM.

### LoriLee — 2026-04-24T01:01:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-watch-the-sunrise-and-sunset.32606/post-371913>

> [JimBo99 said:](/goto/post?id=371897)
>
> What are the biophysics behind having early morning artificial light hit the retinas before you receive the natural, unpolarized light at/before sunrise? I thought I remember jack talking about it, but I can't find it.

I don't know the precise answer to this but LED light tells your body it's noon. Doesn't seem reasonable to tell your body it's noon on the way to seeing sunrise.

He had failure to thrive (unable to gain weight and always sick) for years, severe separation anxiety, very picky eating, ear infections needing multiple sets of tubes, and tonsils and adenoids out before 4 yrs of age. He also started Minecraft hacking and ipad usage around 5 yrs of age. He was outside a lot swimming or playing but with minimal tan bc of SPF sun shirts. We did limit sunscreen.

That illness caused a downward path to acute PANS PANDAS (he went crazy over night, suicidal, afraid of even water coming out of the shower, school refusal, sensory issues, nightmares, hallucination etc), motor tics & throat clearing, and extreme ARFID. # Thread: The Soviet Sanatorium: 70 Years of Quantum Biology Hidden in Plain Sight
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-soviet-sanatorium-70-years-of-quantum-biology-hidden-in-plain-sight.32608/unread>
**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Iceland — 2026-04-22T02:18:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-soviet-sanatorium-70-years-of-quantum-biology-hidden-in-plain-sight.32608/post-371767>

While the West spent the last century perfecting the "**pill for an ill**" model, the Soviet Union—largely due to a lack of pharmaceutical infrastructure and a deep reverence for physics—focused on the **Sanatorium System**. These weren't luxury spas; they were **state-mandated medical facilities** designed to optimize the human semiconductor using Light, Water, and Magnetism.

For decades, the Soviets used environmental inputs to recharge the cellular battery. They mastered the physics of the environment because they couldn't afford the chemistry of the laboratory.

### 1\. Pelotherapy (The Original Full-Body Grounding)​

The Soviets engineered grounding into the very architecture of their sanatoriums. They used **Sapropel** (ancient, electrolyte-dense lake mud) as a conductive interface. By piping this mud directly from the earth through stone or metal systems and coating the patient in it, they created a massive, frictionless flow of electrons from the Earth’s crust into the human body. This was a 3D, heated, mineral-rich "liquid wire" that neutralized positive charge across 100% of the skin’s surface.

### 2\. Intravenous Laser Blood Irradiation (ILBI)​

Realizing the skin can act as a barrier to specific light frequencies, Soviet scientists invented **ILBI**. They developed fiber-optic needles to "inject" Red or UV light directly into the vein. As the blood circulated, it was "bathed" in photons, charging the mitochondria of every red and white blood cell. This turned the entire circulatory system into a light-harvesting antenna.

### 3\. Magnetotherapy and Zeta Potential​

Soviet doctors were obsessed with **Zeta Potential**—the electrical charge that keeps red blood cells from clumping. They used massive **PEMF (Pulsed Electromagnetic Field)** coils to "order" the water in the body and restore the magnetic field of damaged tissues, allowing for improved blood flow without chemical blood thinners.

### 4\. Intermittent Hypoxic-Hyperoxic Training (IHHT)​

The **"Revalit" Method** was a staple of Soviet sports and recovery medicine. By forcing patients to breathe low-oxygen air followed by bursts of high-oxygen air, they created a selective pressure that culled old, leaky mitochondria and triggered the birth of new, high-functioning ones.

### 5\. Speleotherapy (Radon and Salt Caves)​

Soviets utilized deep underground caves for **Radiation Hormesis**. They believed that controlled, trace exposure to ionizing radon gas triggered a massive endogenous repair response and DNA stabilization, forcing the body to upgrade its own antioxidant defense systems.

### 6\. The "Sharko" Shower (Hydro-Aero-Ionization)​

A technique involving high-pressure, high-contrast water hoses. It combined **Cold Thermogenesis** with the **Lenard Effect** (the creation of negative air ions from splashing water). The mechanical pressure and the temperature gradient forced an immediate "electron dump" into the peripheral nervous system.

### 7\. Quartz Lamp Clinics (Fractionated UV)​

In dark, northern latitudes, the Soviets didn't rely on Vitamin D pills. They built **"Quartz" clinics** where children and workers received mandatory, timed doses of UV light. They understood that humans are "light eaters" and that maintaining the photo-period was non-negotiable for circadian health.

### Why the US Needs a Decentralized Biophysics Revolution​

The modern US medical system is centralized around a biochemical model that is failing to address mitochondrial collapse and non-native EMF stress. If we want to solve the chronic disease crisis, we must move toward **Decentralized Medicine focused on Biophysics**.

The Soviets proved that you don't need a massive pharmaceutical supply chain to heal people; you need a deep understanding of how the human body interacts with the Earth's fields. The future of medicine isn't a new molecule—it's the restoration of our connection to physics.

The Nobel scientist who helped discover dark energy now thinks something might be seriously wrong… Modern cosmology faces a reckoning as the scientist who discovered dark energy finds evidence that our fundamental understanding of space is incomplete. In 1998, astronomer Adam Riess helped uncover the startling reality that our universe isn't just expanding, but doing so at an accelerating rate—a feat that earned him the 2011 Nobel Prize in Physics. This acceleration was attributed to "dark energy," a mysterious force thought to comprise roughly 68 percent of the cosmos. However, recent and highly precise measurements using distant supernovae and Cepheid variable stars have revealed a troubling inconsistency known as the "Hubble tension." The universe appears to be flying apart much faster than the standard cosmological model predicts, suggesting that the very foundation of our cosmic understanding may be flawed. This discrepancy has forced the scientific community to confront the possibility that dark energy is not a constant force, but one that evolves over time. If these measurements are accurate, they imply the existence of unknown particles, undiscovered forces, or a need to fundamentally revise our theories of gravity. As Riess and his colleagues continue to probe the limits of the observable universe, the growing tension suggests that the story of dark energy is far more complex than originally thought. We may be on the brink of a new era in physics where our most basic assumptions about the evolution of the universe must be entirely rewritten. Source: The Atlantic. (2025). The Nobel Prize winner who thinks we have the universe all wrong.

A quantum protocol can extract the maximum asymptotic work from many copies of a system without knowing its exact state beforehand, using symmetry and minimal state estimation within the thermal process.

### [Universal work extraction in quantum thermodynamics - Nature Communications](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-026-69143-3)

The maximum work extracted from independent and identically distributed quantum states is characterised only in the state-aware scenario, and it remains unknown with no prior knowledge of the state. Here, the authors show that optimal work extraction can be achieved by a single operation...

 www.nature.com

The question becomes how do we extract the most from our environment in a dynamo failure? I have a sense humanity will need this information in the future.

This Nature Communications paper (Watanabe & Takagi, 3 March 2026) is the exact quantum-thermodynamic blueprint my decentralized thesis needs for “extracting the most from our environment in a dynamo failure.” It proves a universal (state-agnostic) protocol that extracts the maximum asymptotic work rate, precisely the Helmholtz free energy

(rho = _**p**_) is required. The protocol fixes a single quantum channel (independent of input) using permutational symmetry (Schur pinching on (k) copies to project onto symmetric subspaces via Schur-Weyl duality) plus minimal/sublinear state estimation (incoherent measurements on a vanishing fraction of copies, no full tomography). Everything stays within thermal operations (energy-conserving unitaries with a thermal bath). In the limit of many copies
[](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/screenshot-2026-04-22-at-5-08-57%E2%80%AFam-png.36077/)
it achieves the same optimal rate as fully state-aware protocols. This removes the “fundamental operational restriction” that you must know the state before hand, perfect for noisy, fluctuating, unknown environments.

In my thesis, a geomagnetic dynamo failure (declination event, excursion, or reversal is linked to weakened dipole per Kuang et al. 2025 Science Advances, tied to O₂ drops and radiation spikes) turns Earth’s near-surface environment into precisely such a bath: chaotic magnetic gradients, elevated cosmic-ray/neutrino fluxes (modulated by DM–neutrino scattering from Zu et al. 2026), oxidative stress, redox imbalance, and fluctuating “thermal” radiation fields. No cell or organism can have “exact prior knowledge” of this state, it is distributed, time-varying, and extra-dimensional (Williams’ 5D mass-density coordinate leaking “non-universe” EMG waves). The protocol shows how biology extracts maximum usable work anyway.

How Decentralized Biology Implements the Universal Protocol (FRACTAL MAPPING 101)

My decentralized framework already supplies ALL the pieces; this paper supplies the rigorous quantum-thermodynamic mechanism:

-   **Many copies + permutational symmetry:** Trillions of mitochondria per cell (plus melanin networks in elastin/valvular interstitial cells) act as the ensemble of identical subsystems. Cristae lattices and Fe-S clusters exhibit crystalline symmetry and quantum coherence domains. DM–neutrino parity-violation amplification (your earlier point) seeds chiral bias, mirroring the Schur pinching that diagonalizes unknown states without full knowledge. Local 5D isentropic constraints (Williams) enforce this symmetry globally, no central “state estimator” needed.
-   **Minimal state estimation:** Melanin is the biological sensor, paramagnetic, electron-transferring, radiosynthesizing, and UV-A (380 nm) responsive. It detects gradients (radiation spikes from SAA expansion, magnetic declination drift, UPE broadening) with sublinear “measurements” (no cellular tomography of the entire environmental quantum state). This is exactly the paper’s incoherent type-measurement on a vanishing fraction of copies. Melanin migration in the elastin fulcrum (my heart/circulatory moving fulcrum) dynamically tunes the protocol in real time under planetary stress.
-   Thermal operations + work extraction: Mitochondria operate as quantum thermal machines in contact with the cellular bath. The universal channel (fixed by 5D thermodynamic laws) converts unknown environmental fluctuations into coherent proton tunneling, electron spin resonance in the ETC, and LENR catalysis (Widom-Larsen ULMNs via dark-sector mediators).
-   **Result:** maximum asymptotic free-energy extraction as deuterium-depleted water (DDW), trace-element transmutations (K→Ca, C/O→Fe in heme, succination reversal), and UPE coherence—preventing entropy surges while delivering Lane’s 10,000× solar energy density. -   **Asymptotic optimality in dynamo failure:** During weak-field stress (O₂ modulation per Kuang, radiation gradients amplified), the protocol still saturates the bound. No knowledge of the exact “dynamo-failed” state is needed, the higher-level planetary context (Ellis’s top-down causation) sets the thermostat, while local 5D rules + symmetry + melanin sensing deliver optimal work. _**This is why mitochondria outpace the Sun: the decentralized manifold turns environmental chaos into controlled alchemy.**_

**Ties to the Full Thesis (5D + Ellis + LENR/Alchemy)**

-   **Williams’ 5D Dynamic Theory:** The universal protocol emerges from the same local thermodynamic laws applied across interdependent coordinates. Gauge potentials depend functionally on space-time-mass-density or fields vanish; the paper’s state-agnostic channel is the mathematical embodiment—symmetry and minimal estimation keep the system isentropic under unknown inputs. ### House to Hold Hearings on CIA’s MKULTRA Program​

-   [By Adan Salazar](https://www.alexjoneslive.com/author/adans/)

-   May 5th, 2026 2:30 PM

-   Secretive government experiments reportedly sought to create mind-controlled assassins.

-   **The House Oversight Committee will hold hearings next week regarding the CIA’s Cold War-era MKUltra program, which reportedly attempted to create mind controlled assassins.**

“Hearing on May 13. MK Ultra. House Oversight Taskforce,” Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-Fla.) announced on X last week.

> Hearing on May 13. MK Ultra. House Oversight Taskforce. [pic.twitter.com/0Sz4filfXi](https://t.co/0Sz4filfXi)
> — Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (@RepLuna) [April 29, 2026](https://twitter.com/RepLuna/status/2049551130863034456?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw)

The MKUltra experiments were intended to test the effects of hallucinogenic and psychoactive drugs, as well as forms of psychotherapy – including electroshock therapy – on human subjects, aiming to research and perfect torture and interrogation methods, which could be used to create “Manchurian candidates,” who could be “programmed” to carry out acts, including assassinations.
The experiments were supplemented by other CIA programs including MKNAOMI, which tested the effects of biological and chemical agents and delivery systems for covert operations and assassinations, and MKDELTA, which put MKULTRA methods into operation in the field.
A predecessor of the program, Project Artichoke, also investigated how drugs and chemicals could be covertly distributed to populations, including via food, water, beer, and vaccinations.

Rep. Luna follows in the footsteps of other lawmakers who have previously attempted to shed light on the MKUltra program.
In 1975, President Gerald Ford directed his vice president, Nelson Rockefeller, to investigate the CIA’s domestic activities and reports of unwitting MKUltra test subjects, known as the Rockefeller Commission.
That same year, Sen. Frank Church (D-Idaho) also led a Senate select committee, known as the Church Committee, investigating reported CIA abuses, surveillance and rumored assassination plots.
At one point during the hearing, lawmakers showed a gun retrofitted to shoot poison darts that could covertly kill a subject by supposedly causing a heart attack.
A hearing in 1977 conducted by Sen. Edward Moore “Ted” Kennedy (D-Mass.), Robert. F. Kennedy Jr.’s uncle, also sought to uncover more details about the MKUltra’s human experimentation, drug testing and behavioral modifications.
It will be very interesting to see what new findings are uncovered in the House’s upcoming probe

> -   **The House Oversight Committee will hold hearings next week regarding the CIA’s Cold War-era MKUltra program, which reportedly attempted to create mind controlled assassins.**
>
> “Hearing on May 13. MK Ultra. House Oversight Taskforce,” Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-Fla.) announced on X last week.
>
> The MKUltra experiments were intended to test the effects of hallucinogenic and psychoactive drugs, as well as forms of psychotherapy – including electroshock therapy – on human subjects, aiming to research and perfect torture and interrogation methods, which could be used to create “Manchurian candidates,” who could be “programmed” to carry out acts, including assassinations.
> The experiments were supplemented by other CIA programs including MKNAOMI, which tested the effects of biological and chemical agents and delivery systems for covert operations and assassinations, and MKDELTA, which put MKULTRA methods into operation in the field.
> A predecessor of the program, Project Artichoke, also investigated how drugs and chemicals could be covertly distributed to populations, including via food, water, beer, and vaccinations.
>
>
> Rep. Luna follows in the footsteps of other lawmakers who have previously attempted to shed light on the MKUltra program.
> In 1975, President Gerald Ford directed his vice president, Nelson Rockefeller, to investigate the CIA’s domestic activities and reports of unwitting MKUltra test subjects, known as the Rockefeller Commission.
> That same year, Sen. Frank Church (D-Idaho) also led a Senate select committee, known as the Church Committee, investigating reported CIA abuses, surveillance and rumored assassination plots.
> At one point during the hearing, lawmakers showed a gun retrofitted to shoot poison darts that could covertly kill a subject by supposedly causing a heart attack.
> A hearing in 1977 conducted by Sen. Edward Moore “Ted” Kennedy (D-Mass.), Robert. F. Kennedy Jr.’s uncle, also sought to uncover more details about the MKUltra’s human experimentation, drug testing and behavioral modifications.
> It will be very interesting to see what new findings are uncovered in the House’s upcoming probe

### Iceland — 2026-04-23T23:13:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-greenland-gambit-it%E2%80%99s-not-about-russia%E2%80%94it%E2%80%99s-about-the-last-reservoirs-of-ddw.32619/post-371900>

I’ve been connecting the dots on Dr. Kruse’s recent warnings about the **South Atlantic Anomaly (SAA)** and the weakening magnetic field, and I think I’ve figured out the _real_ reason the **US** is so obsessed with **Greenland**.

It’s not about "trade routes" or "Russia." It’s about **Mitochondrial Survival.**

### The Core of My Theory:​

As the magnetic field shifts and weakens, we lose our "Van Allen" protection. This increases cosmic ray flux, which Kruse has hinted will lead to a **heavy deuterium loading** of the world's water supply.

**Here is why Greenland is the ultimate prize:**

-   **The Last Source of Protium:** The Greenland Ice Sheet is essentially "frozen time." It was formed when the Earth’s magnetic field was robust and the water was significantly more **Deuterium Depleted (DDW)**.
-   **The Biological "Strategic Reserve":** While the world’s surface water gets "heavier" due to the magnetic shift, Greenland sits on the largest reservoir of "Quantum-Grade" water on the planet.
-   **The Great Annexation:** I believe the push to control Greenland is a move to secure the only remaining supply of "clean fuel" for the elite’s mitochondria. They know that in a post-magnetic shift world, **DDW will be more valuable than oil or gold.**

### Why Greenland?​

If you look at the **SAA** maps, the magnetic field is thinning out elsewhere, but the North is where the "old ice" remains. It’s a massive battery of low-deuterium protons. Whoever owns that ice owns the ability to repair their DNA and keep their colony’s "motors" spinning while the rest of the world’s biology fails due to deuterium poisoning.

**Bottom Line:** The US doesn't want Greenland for the land; they want the **Deuterium-Depleted Ice** to survive the **"Quantum Winter"** caused by the magnetic pole shift.

### Jack Kruse — 2026-04-24T00:23:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-greenland-gambit-it%E2%80%99s-not-about-russia%E2%80%94it%E2%80%99s-about-the-last-reservoirs-of-ddw.32619/post-371907>

I do not think so any longer.

This is the "Magnetic Arctic Flashover." While the "experts" in the Atlantic are looking at the 4x warming rate and blaming the thermometer, I have identified the Planetary Obex being "clogged" in real-time. The water all around Greenland is now going to devoid of oxygen and loaed with deuterium. This is why msoqiiotos are in Iceland now.
The arrival of arthropods (mosquitoes) in Iceland, a place that was historically "magnetically protected" by its proximity to the North Pole, is the clinical sign that the Magnetic Stator is no longer pinning the atmosphere to the oceans in the North Atlantic.

**1\. The Arctic as the "Planetary Brain"**
In the Human Lagrangian, the brain is the 2% mass/20% power End-User. In the Earth's system, the Arctic is the "Isotopic Cold-Trap."

The High-Dielectric Shield: The magnetic field lines converge at the poles. This "pins" the oxygen and creates the high-pressure Magnetic Stator that keeps the Arctic water "light" and low-entropy. The collapse of the Atlantic thermohaline current is a horrendous new sign for my thesis.

The Stall: As the Magnetic Declination jerks toward Siberia and the dipole weakens, the "pin" is pulled. The Arctic is losing its Z-axis torque. This is why it is "warming" 4x faster, it is a Dielectric Breakdown of the polar atmosphere.

**2\. Arthropods as "Magnetic Sensors"**
Insects are "natural sensors."

The Chitin Antenna: An arthropod’s exoskeleton (chitin) is a piezoelectric semiconductor. They are extremely sensitive to the 160THz signal of the environment.

The Incursion: Mosquitoes are moving into Iceland not just for the "heat," but because the Magnetic Resistance that used to keep them out has collapsed. The "viscosity" of the Arctic air has dropped because the Universal Stator is no longer "rectifying" the local field. They are the "D-Speed Bumps" of the atmosphere, signaling that the "Isotopic Insufflation" has reached the North. This is really bad news.

**3\. Thermohaline Collapse: The "Planetary SANS"**
The "collapse of the thermohaline currents" (AMOC) in the North Atlantic is the planetary equivalent of SANS (Spaceflight Associated Neuro-ocular Syndrome).

The Hydraulic Failure: The "conveyor belt" is the Z-axis vortex of the ocean.

The Silt: As the dynamo weakens, the ocean loses its ability to "sink" the heavy, high-viscosity water. The "Obex" of the North Atlantic (Iceland) is becoming clogged with "Isotopic Silt."

The Misnomer: Calling this "Climate Change" is like calling ALS"Muscular Fatigue." It ignores the fact that the Dynamo (The Motor) is stalling.

**4\. The 2026 "Jerk" and the "Red Spot"**

As the SAA (The South Atlantic Red Spot) grows and splits, the "Magnetic Tension" of the whole planet is fraying.

The Global De-Frag: Iceland and the North Atlantic are the "Topological Gates." When these gates fail, the "Maillard-Orange" entropy of the tropics (the mosquitoes and the heat) "leaks" into the high-dielectric North.

The Arctic Flashover: This is a Planetary Intersystem Crossing (ISC). The Earth is "thrashing" just like a child in Emergence Delirium as it tries to reboot its dynamo.

**5\. My Decentralized Synthesis: Navigating the Collapse**
The "larger transformation" the experts warn about is the End of the Holocene Stator.

My Message Now: We are moving into an era of Magnetic Instability so you will need to move as it moves.

My Response: To survive the "Arctic Flashover," we must "Jade-stabilize" our own internal lattices. We can no longer rely on the Earth's "Conveyor Belt" or "Magnetic Shield" to keep us coherent anymore.

**The Decentralized Conclusion:** The mosquito in Iceland is the "Isotopic Canary." It proves that the Universal Stator is no longer guarding the gates. The "Climate" is just the "Software" crashing because the "Magnetic Hardware" has a Ground Fault.

This is the "Flashover Point" of myour thesis. I have identified the **Mid-Atlantic Ridge** as the planetary **"Magnetic Grounding Strap"** and the new **Schwinger Limit** research as the mathematical blueprint for the **"160THz Universal Stator."**
If the Icelandic basaltic flux fails, we aren't just looking at a "weather shift"; we are looking at the **Dielectric Breakdown of the ENTIRE North Atlantic soon.

Why?**

Iceland: The "Basaltic Rectifier" Iceland sits directly on the Mid-Atlantic Ridge, where the **Z-axis flux** of the deep dynamo "pierces" the crust.
**The Local Stator:** The massive basaltic fields (paramagnetic crystals) act as a **Magnetic Anchor** for the North Atlantic water table. It "pins" the light H+ protons, keeping the AMOC (the planets Vagal Exhaust spinning) Data was in the NYT yesterday thatnew data shows it is failing andfailing rapdily. This means staying in Iceland now carries bigger risks if the AMOC stops. No way you'll get out.

**The Implication of Failure is unreal.** If the volcanic flux stops "pinning" the field, the **"Isotopic Silt"** of the SAA will flood the North. The water will become viscous, the "Conveyor Belt" will stall permanently, and the North Atlantic will "brown" into a **Maillard-Orange**atavistic swamp. Iceland's "mosquitoes" are the first sign of this **Magnetic Resistance** dropping. In other words, it is already begun.

### Iceland — 2026-04-24T01:03:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-greenland-gambit-it%E2%80%99s-not-about-russia%E2%80%94it%E2%80%99s-about-the-last-reservoirs-of-ddw.32619/post-371914>

**The 1980s "Jar" (The Historical Baseline):** For over 40 years, Iceland’s "mosquito population" consisted of exactly **one specimen**. In the mid-1980s, biologist Gísli Már Gíslason captured a lone stowaway on a plane arriving from Greenland. It was preserved in a jar at the Icelandic Institute of Natural History. For decades, it was a biological anomaly; the insect could not establish itself in the wild because the Icelandic "Stator" (the unstable weather oscillations) killed any larvae that tried to hatch during winter thaws.

**The October 2025 Catch (The Biological Shift):** In late 2025, the "Last Fortress" fell. A resident in Kjós (near Reykjavík) named Björn Hjaltason caught **three live mosquitoes** outdoors.

**The Capture Method:** They weren't caught in a swamp or a trap. They were caught using **"wine ropes"**—ropes soaked in a mixture of sugar and red wine, originally intended to attract moths.

-   **Species:** Confirmed by the Institute of Natural History as _Culiseta annulata_ (the "Banded Mosquito").
-   **The Difference:** Unlike the 1980s stowaway, these were found in the wild, active during a period of record-breaking heat (hitting 26°C) and navigating an atmosphere that scientists say is becoming "hospitable" for the first time in recorded history.

# Thread: The Isotopic Fountain of Youth: The "Light Water" Secret of the Siberian Centenarians
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-isotopic-fountain-of-youth-the-light-water-secret-of-the-siberian-centenarians.32621/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Iceland — 2026-04-24T16:40:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-isotopic-fountain-of-youth-the-light-water-secret-of-the-siberian-centenarians.32621/post-371960>

While modern health circles often debate about the best "superfoods," a group of Soviet scientists in the 1960s discovered that the ultimate secret to longevity wasn't something you added to your life—it was something you left out.

Researchers like **Gennady Berdyshev** and **V.M. Muhachev** from Tomsk University headed into the Siberian mountains to solve a major mystery: How were the **Yakut** and **Altai** populations living past 100 in such harsh conditions, with almost no dietary variety?

They found the answer in the **DDW (Deuterium-Depleted Water)** flowing from the glaciers.

### **The "Heavy" vs. "Light" Water Secret**​

The scientists discovered that the water these tribes were drinking was fundamentally different from the water in the rest of the world. Because of how glaciers freeze and melt over thousands of years, they act as a natural filter for a heavy, clunky version of hydrogen called **Deuterium**.

The result was natural **DDW**. This water was 20–25% lighter than standard ocean or tap water. The Soviet team realized that this "Light Water" was the true common denominator behind the tribes’ legendary health and survival.

### **The Survival Paradox**​

This research explains why these people didn't need a fancy diet or modern medicine to reach 100. When you optimize your hydrogen and lower your internal Deuterium levels using **DDW**:

1.  **DNA Stays Stable:** Your genetic blueprint is protected from the "heavy" hits that cause mutations.
2.  **Repair is Faster:** Your body spends less energy "filtering" toxins and more energy on cellular regeneration.
3.  **Metabolism Peaks:** Your mitochondria spin faster and more efficiently.

The Soviet findings suggest that **DDW** is the hidden foundation of biological resilience. The "Fountain of Youth" isn't a myth; it’s simply the absence of a heavy isotope that has been slowing down our biology for centuries.

### ​

# Thread: The 2055 "Quantum Lifeboat": Does New Zealand Win the Triple-Threat Reset?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-2055-quantum-lifeboat-does-new-zealand-win-the-triple-threat-reset.32622/>
**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 9
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Iceland — 2026-04-24T17:36:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-2055-quantum-lifeboat-does-new-zealand-win-the-triple-threat-reset.32622/post-371972>

Looking at the convergence of the **AMOC collapse**, the **SAA (South Atlantic Anomaly)** expansion, and the ongoing **Magnetic Pole Shift**, the global "Quantum Map" appears to be undergoing a total redrawing. If these variables are projected out 25–30 years, a very specific "Lifeboat" theory emerges regarding where biology can actually thrive.

When the environmental "off-switch" flips, it seems **New Zealand** becomes a prime candidate for a sanctuary based on a specific set of biophysical reasons.

### **The Triple-Threat Convergence**​

-   **AMOC Collapse (Isotopic & Thermal Reset):** As the North Atlantic "conveyor belt" fails, the Northern Hemisphere loses its primary thermal buffer. Europe, North America, and Siberia face a deep freeze and a total collapse of the agricultural growing season. This isn't just about cold; it’s the end of natural **DDW (Deuterium-Depleted Water)** fractionation in the North.
-   **SAA Expansion (The Radiation Leak):** The South Atlantic Anomaly is drifting Northwest and growing. This "dent" in the magnetic shield is a mitochondrial death trap. Locations sitting under it face spiked **Heteroplasmy rates** because the magnetosphere can no longer deflect high-energy protons.
-   **Magnetic Pole Shift:** As the field weakens during the shift, the collective shield fails. Survival requires a location where the local magnetic flux remains relatively stable and distant from the "leak" zones.

### **Why New Zealand as a "2055 Winner"?**​

-   **Magnetic Strength:** NZ is currently positioned far enough from the SAA "dent" to maintain a more functional magnetic shield compared to Atlantic-facing regions.
-   **Isotopic Wealth:** It remains one of the few regions with massive, high-altitude glaciers that will continue providing natural **DDW** when the atmospheric distillation cycle in the North breaks down.
-   **Thermal Resilience:** While the "breadbaskets" of the Northern Hemisphere fail, the Southern Hemisphere (New Zealand specifically) stays temperate, preserving the ability to grow food.
-   **The Proximity Factor:** It is geographically isolated from the rogue jet streams and the "Heavy Water" spikes that will likely plague the equatorial and Northern regions once the ocean currents flip.

### **The Question for Dr. Kruse**​

If the Northern Hemisphere is transitioning into a low-energy, high-deuterium, high-stress wasteland with zero food security, does New Zealand represent the ultimate **"Quantum Lifeboat"**?

Does the balance of magnetic shielding combined with a constant supply of glacial **DDW** make it the top choice for long-term mitochondrial survival? Furthermore, what is the estimation on the timing—are we looking at a 30-year window before the "Quantum Exit" from the Northern Hemisphere becomes a biological necessity?

My Journal page 24 is CRYSTAL CLEAR

In the Northern Hemisphere (NH), the magnetic field lines are generally **converging** toward the North Pole (the "Input"). In the SH, they are **diverging** (the "Exhaust").

**The Suction:** As the dipole weakens, the "divergence" becomes chaotic. In my framework, the SAA is a **Low-Pressure Hole** in the planetary dielectric.

**Isotopic Bleed:** This "vacuum" effect makes it nearly impossible to maintain the **40 million V/m field** on the IMM. The "heavy" isotopes (D+ & T+) aren't being centrifuged out any longer; they are being "sucked in" from the ionosphere. This is the **"Isotopic Insufflation"** I've mentioned here a lot lately.
Some have asked me privately how this could ever be optimal. Historically, it was only optimal when the **Horizontal Component (H)** was strong enough to act as a **Magnetic Dam**.

**The Dielectric Brake:** At lower latitudes (like the "Perth-Sydney" belt or "Northern Oz"), a strong horizontal field "pins" the protons horizontally, preventing them from being sucked up into the "vacuum" of the frayed vertical lines.

**The Current Stall:** In the current decline, the horizontal component is collapsing. This removes the "brake," allowing the **Z-axis vortex** of the heart and brain to "leak" into the SAA hole. This is why we see the **"Empty Sella"** and **"SANS"** phenotypes on the surface in the SH in Brazil now. People will drop dead of heart disease and lose consciousness when they have no disease. These are the signals I am looking for. They are now here.
The only way life remains "optimal" in the SH under these conditions is by **Up-regulating Melanin. This is why the blogs are teaching you this lesson in detail. This is life saving information and many of you still want to argue.

The Rectifier:** Melanin acts as the **"Topological Plug"** for the vacuum. It provides the localized paramagnetic torque to keep the **160THz signal** from being sucked out of the lattice.

**The SH Paradox:** This is why Australia has the highest melanoma rates. The "Suction" is so high that the melanin is being **overworked and "bleached"** (deuterated) as it tries to hold the dielectric line against the Van Allen belt collapse.
I have said for 20 years the melanoma was not caused by the sun and I hope some of you wake the fuck up.
The "Siberian Jerk" is the Final Pull of this event. It is now happening.
As the North Pole "jerks" toward Siberia, it is increasing the **Torsional Strain** on the SH vacuum.

It's like a "Tug-of-War" where the NH is pulling the string, and the SH "knot" (the SAA) is unraveling.

**The ONLY Solution:** You must **Limit the Suction** manually. This is why **3% NaCl and 92.5 ppm DDW** are non-negotiable in the SH. You are increasing your internal "Hydraulic Pressure" to push back against the planetary "Vacuum."
Time for you all to wake up to the reality of what is really going on. You've been lied to so long that when someone tells you about your version of the asteroid headed at your species want to sit and argue about it. We do not have this time any longer.

# Thread: Accessories for keeping bluelight blockers from falling off face
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/accessories-for-keeping-bluelight-blockers-from-falling-off-face.32625/unread>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### AlbertD — 2026-04-25T07:21:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/accessories-for-keeping-bluelight-blockers-from-falling-off-face.32625/post-372019>

I've been using rubber bands to create a stopper as a cheap way to keep my glasses from falling off my face. I'm curious if anyone has any suggestions for accessories to keep it glued on my face. It annoying to have to constantly adjust my glasses. I have to constantly walk around in my day-to-day. I don't like the

I've seen a combination of rubber nosegards or ear hooks. I initially thought the ear hooks would be too conspicuous (similar ot the straps), but it's hangs on well behind the ears.

### AlbertW — 2026-05-01T16:25:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/accessories-for-keeping-bluelight-blockers-from-falling-off-face.32625/post-372729>

There are some pads you can buy to attach to the nose bridge area to narrow the distance. That helps for my daughter.

In case you're not aware, some prescription glasses companies like JINS will make Asian-fit or low-nose-bridge frames, which suit Asian faces better. I couldn't find any for blue light blockers, so resorted to adding on adhesive pads.

You could also try buying an Asian-fit frame and then sending it to a blue-light blocker lens company to fit it in.

# Thread: From "Gym Bro" to Empty Sella: The Hidden Price of Creatine Abuse
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/from-gym-bro-to-empty-sella-the-hidden-price-of-creatine-abuse.32626/>

### Iceland — 2026-04-25T15:09:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/from-gym-bro-to-empty-sella-the-hidden-price-of-creatine-abuse.32626/post-372028>

Hi Dr. Kruse and community,

I want to open a discussion on the "sacred cow" of the fitness world: **Creatine**.

Whether it’s the standard 5g dose or the new "longevity" trend of 20-30g daily for "brain health," I believe we are looking at a massive mitochondrial disaster. The fitness gurus tell us that creatine is safe because it "hydrates" the cells, but looking through the lens of **Quantum Biology**, this "hydration" looks more like a **Deuterium Trojan Horse.

1\. The Muscle Edema vs. Structured Water** Even at low doses (5g), creatine’s primary mechanism is pulling water into the tissues. But if you are drinking municipal water and living under nnEMF, you aren't pulling in structured (EZ) water; you are pulling in **bulk water loaded with Deuterium.** Does this create a "puffy" extracellular stagnation that actually lowers the **Redox** of the muscle? It seems like we are traded mitochondrial "torque" for a fake, water-logged "pump" that gumming up the ATP synthase motors.

**2\. The 30g "Brain" Trend: Pushing the Limit** The recent hype claims we need 20-30g to cross the Blood-Brain Barrier (BBB) for cognitive benefits. This sounds like a recipe for neurological ruin. If the brain is supposed to be the most deuterium-depleted organ in the body, wouldn't mega-dosing a synthetic chemical that drags heavy water across the BBB be a "**Deuterium Bomb**" for our neurons?

**3\. The Industrial "Gunk" (DCDA & Triazines)** We also have to talk about the **physics of the manufacturing.** Most creatine is a synthetic chemical byproduct from **China**. You’ve warned about **DCDA** and **Triazines**—toxic residues that survive "purity" tests. When these synthetic molecules are exposed to the **2.4GHz–100GHz (Wi-Fi/5G)** environment most people live in, does it amplify the toxicity and disrupt our biophoton signaling?

**4\. Empty Sella and Pressure** Is the "Creatine Toxicity" you’ve linked to **Empty Sella Syndrome** a direct result of this altered fluid pressure? It feels like people are literally "swelling" their brains and flattening their pituitaries just to see a higher number on the scale.

**The Question:** How do we educate people that "cell volumization" is actually a loss of cellular energy (Redox) once you factor in the **Deuterium Kinetic Isotope Effect**? And for those who have used this "crutch" for years, what is the best way to "de-frag" the spinal cord and cerebellum to restore proper proton hopping?

# Thread: Moved from Northern to Southern Japan
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/moved-from-northern-to-southern-japan.32634/unread>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### salva21m — 2026-04-26T05:12:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/moved-from-northern-to-southern-japan.32634/post-372116>

Hello everyone, I started implementing Dr. Kruse's protocols since around 1 year ago. My health improved significantly, actually as never before on all levels. I suffered a bit with the winter in Northern Japan (I am originally from Lisbon, Portugal, but I don't know my haplotype, I am caucasian with brown hair and brown eyes). As I still needed a job, I moved to Southern Kyushu as I got an opportunity here. My health improved dramatically, I got way more tanned than before, I started walking barefoot in dark sand beaches not far from me. This region of Southern Kyushu is quite volcanic. Kagoshima is just next door and I can see a volcano from my window far away, this volcano is called Sakurajima and has been active recently. There are many other volcanoes around here. Looking at Dr. Kruse's new findings on magnetic shifts, I think this was a great decision. My next step is to move even more towards the countryside in the same region, so I can be protected as much as possible from nnEMF in city. Now I feel that big cities in Japan like Tokyo, Osaka etc, are no-go zones. People are displaying crazy behaviors and getting more sick there, I heard many cases of cancers and other chronic diseases are increasing. I am still reading every single patreon blog so I can learn as much as possible and I would like to become a gold member soon. Hope I can meet other black swans in person one day.

### Jack Kruse — 2026-04-26T20:28:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/gaia-what-are-you-doing.32637/post-372162>

(Ben Davidson / Suspicious0bservers): Focuses on solar-driven disaster cycles, magnetic weakening tied to solar minimums/maximums, and gradual-to-accelerated geophysical stress. He emphasizes observable data like pole drift speed, quake energy release, and solar-terrestrial coupling without invoking rapid crustal displacement. He also is weak on biological coupling since he is a lawyer.

ECDO (Exothermic Core-Mantle Decoupling – Dzhanibekov Oscillation, primarily advanced by Roger Cunningham / The Ethical Skeptic): Proposes that exothermic processes in the core weaken coupling with the mantle, leading to a sudden gyroscopic reorientation of the outer shell (crust + upper mantle) around the spin axis, like a Dzhanibekov flip, to restore stability. This would explain ancient temple alignments to prior pole positions, rapid sea-level/flood evidence, and the current SAA expansion + multipolar hints as precursors. Uncle Jack (Kruse) has recently highlighted arguments AGAINST this mechanism because it requires a loss of mass and that is not what is happening now on Earth. ECDO does partially aligns with observed core-mantle dynamics, lattice stress, and the isotopic/thermal tipping points he has mapped. So your understanding is not his.

Nikolai Goncharov, Vyacheslav Morozov, and Valery Makarov (often called the “Russian trio”) are directly relevant. In the 1970s they published work (later expanded in Khimiya i Zhizn’ and other Soviet journals) proposing that Earth functions as a natural geoinformation system, a crystalline grid based on a dual icosahedron-dodecahedron geometry anchored to the rotational poles and major tectonic features.

Key points from their framework:

-   Major nodes and lines align with ancient sacred sites, volcanic hotspots, magnetic anomalies, and fracture zones.
-   The grid suggests an inherent planetary-scale organization that could influence (or be influenced by) geomagnetic field behavior.
-   Later refined by Becker-Hagens into the Unified Vector Geometry (UVG) grid, which maps ~60+ intersection points globally.

A.D. Kitov (in 2009 papers on “Structure of the Earth Natural Geoinformation System”) extended this line of Russian research, modeling grid structures as invariant topological frameworks for physical-geographical space, essentially treating the planet’s magnetic/tectonic layout as a self-organizing information system rather than random convection. These ideas predate modern SAA data and pole-drift acceleration but predicted geometric regularities that line up with today’s observations: the SAA as a “calcified” weak node, westward drift toward the Caribbean, multipolar complexity, and ancient sites potentially aligned to prior pole configurations (a key point ECDO theory also leverages heavily).

The Russian grid work + ECDO + Sunweatherman’s solar coupling all point to the same higher-dimensional reality I’ve been mapping via decentralized biology of the IMM:

-   The planetary stator (dynamo + geomagnetic field) isn’t a simple bar magnet, it has geometric, resonant, and topological properties that the ancients (pyramids over aquifers, Rhind Papyrus precision) intuitively engineered around.
-   Current changes (SAA expansion as the “calcified pineal,” isotopic sandstorm, Van Allen dips) are symptoms of the stator fraying on a big scale.
-   Parrots demand “zero proof” or dismiss it as gradualism. Eagles integrate the grid geometry, core-mantle decoupling mechanics, and solar forcing into one coherent view, then build resilience (ketone sovereignty, microbial BNF, electroculture, nnEMF reduction, outdoor lattice maintenance).

The ancients weren’t guessing. The Russians in the 1970s weren’t guessing. Ben Davidson is guessing. Modern data (Swarm, WMM2025, ancient site alignments) is catching up to many of them. The magnetic field is changing bigly, and my decentralized response is to stop treating symptoms in isolation and start operating from the full topology by carefully looking at the most important part of the story; what is life doing on the Crust and why is it happening? None of the others have gone this path.

So I disagree with your premise.

# Thread: Kon-tiki - inspiration for a decentralized savage
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/kon-tiki-inspiration-for-a-decentralized-savage.32638/unread>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### stuart31 — 2026-04-26T23:12:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/kon-tiki-inspiration-for-a-decentralized-savage.32638/post-372166>

I guess many people would have learned about this in grade school, but I just watched the documentary and am awestruck so thought to share with those not familiar. In 1947 these Norwegians used a simple raft made from balsa wood and rope to sail 5000 miles across the ocean from Peru to the French polynesian islands, apparently just to see if it was possible.

They describe how these consistent, steady winds, produced partially by the rotation of earth on its axis, could have assisted in humans populating these islands. This was in opposition to the accepted idea that they were populated by ships from Asia against the prevailing winds.

Along this 5000 mile voyage over 100+ days they were met by an ocean teeming with life which provided abundant seafood to eat. Flying fish would land helpless on the deck of their raft every morning providing them with breakfast. They could simply put a hook and line into the water and catch fish like nothing. Sharks were frequently encountered which they would bring aboard and kill them as protection from being eaten alive. They were able to avoid depleting their water supplies by drinking the lymph from larger fish which naturally filter out salt. They even caught cuttlefish to use as ink wells for writing in their journals. Interestingly enough they also brought a parrot with them on their voyage..

If nothing else, it's inspirational how these men were able to complete this fantastic feat without modern resources and technology but by harnessing nature's power. Once they set sail, they were unable to turn around even if they wanted to. They fully had their skin in the game. Once they were all in, it's almost as if nature provided for them along the way with provisions they never could have expected.

As I'm here constructing my own metaphorical life raft to get out of dodge, I can't help but wonder if this incredible expedition may carry some lessons about earth's magnetic field as well as being an inspirational story..

# Thread: Submariners vs. Cosmonauts: The 200-Day "Steel Cage" Experiment

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/submariners-vs-cosmonauts-the-200-day-steel-cage-experiment.32640/post-372168>

Hi Dr. Kruse,

You often speak about the "extinction-level" biological damage that **cosmonauts** face in space due to the lack of the Earth’s magnetic field, zero grounding, and high radiation. You’ve made it clear that the ISS is essentially a mitochondrial death trap.

My question is about the people at the other extreme: **Submariners.**

We just saw a record set this month (April 2026) where the crew of the **HMS Vanguard spent 205 days straight underwater** without surfacing.

From a Quantum Biology perspective, these men are living in a literal Faraday Cage (steel hull) that blocks the Schumann Resonance, they have zero grounding to the Earth's surface, and they are surrounded by massive amounts of nnEMF from nuclear reactors and sonar—all while being deprived of UV/IR sunlight.

1.  Is the biological damage to a submariner on a 200-day patrol comparable to a cosmonaut on the ISS ?
2.  In your opinion, what happens to their **Redox potential** after 7 months in a "canned air" environment with zero solar signaling?
3.  Are these crews essentially "aging" years in a matter of months, similar to what we see with bone density and telomere loss in astronauts?

**I’d love to hear your take on whether the "Steel Tube" is just as dangerous as the "Space Station" for our colony of mitochondria.**

# Thread: Hello! New Member leaving Florida for the Philippines

### Branko Hodzic — 2026-04-27T22:24:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-new-member-leaving-florida-for-the-philippines.32645/post-372235>

Hello Everyone,
I'm excited to be learning for Dr. Jack and all of you all. I've been casually reading/watching Dr. Jack on podcasts/X, etc... and finally a perfect storm of events created a realization Dr. Jack makes a lot of sense and I needed to take action.

I grew up in DC/VA/MD and have been living in Daytona beach for 6 years. I was diagnosed with Ulcerative Colitis when i was 21 years old, I'm now 46, and had been on medication until I moved to florida, in which i made a massive diet change into Carnivore and i kicked the meds. However, when i stray, symptoms come back. While happy that my condition has not plagued me, I couldn't help but feeling that this is a temporary measure. Centralized medicine had me angry long before Covid, and seemed to not make sense, and same with my new diet. However, it was working. Appointments with physicians, GIs, & dermatologists, have just made me more and more frustrated.

In an amazing turn of events, we just happened to be selling our house in Daytona, and are relocating to the Philippines, mainly because of my business and to be closer to extended family. (my wife is from there) Our house went under contract last week, and fortuitously I went down a Dr. Jack rabbit hole and learned about the SAA and its proximity with florida. My recent blood panel showed i was very much vitamin D deficient. After speaking with a bunch of other Floridians, who shockingly are also Vit D deficient, i stumbled upon Dr. Jacks response to a florida surfer who posted about this same effect and the problems with the SAA. At this point, i jumped into the rabbit hole.

After binging Dr. Jack's posts, I was thrilled to learn that the Philippines is within the top 10 places to be in preparing for the Magnetic Declination. My wife and I plan to buy a lot and build a house, and what perfect timing to learn about Dr. Jack's volcanic stone incorporation to his house. We will be sourcing local volcanic stone and incorporating it in as many places as we can within our new home, grounding points, and establishing a perfect area to soak in the sun.

I plan on catching up with the wealth of info on this site, rereading Dr. Jack's book, and trying to get up to speed with a competent knowledge base. Its been one bombshell revelation after another, as I continue to learn from all the materials.

If you made it this far, I appreciate you and hope to converse with you all in the future.

Sincerley,

Branko

### BigDave5000 — 2026-04-28T03:01:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-to-the-forum.32647/post-372267>

Hello Everyone, my name is Dave. Very new to Dr Kruse. Been following on X for about a year.
Just started digging in and joined the Forum and became a Gold Member. I feel like a
Rockefeller Disaster, and reading the Forum is the first time I've felt any hope in several years. I’ll probably ask some dumb questions, but i am here to learn.

2019 I was diagnosed with Lyme.
2020 Ulcerative Colitis treated with Remicade and now Skyrizi
2021 Hip Replacement
2022 2023 were pretty good
2024 Got cover really bad in January. It was a rough spring with weird symptoms.
2024 Got the other hip replaced. A nerve got nicked and it healed really slow.
2024 In August went to ER for a Contrast CT with Visipaque. 36 hours later had severe tinnitus,
weird Neuro/Cognitive issues, and severe insomnia. Of course they deny that any of it was
caused by the contrast. I haven't gotten any more than about 3-4 hours of consistent sleep a
night since then. I feel like crap all the time and the Cognitive is getting worse.

What have i done in the last year?
Converted house to incandescents. Only use light at night if something happens. Otherwise
only a dim red bulb so i don't run into anything.
See the sunrise every morning
I had an EMF specialist survey the house. He found three things that need to be fixed. Those
are in progress. I got solar in 2024. I do have Dirty Electricity but have been able to get it below
the recommended levels with filters.
Just received Mastic Gum
I cold plunge five days a week
Starting DDW this week.
Lots and lots of reading and word searching on the Forum
Epi-Paleo RX is on Order
Will be ordering a Magnetico pad

Ive been on TRT and have a CPAP for the last ten years. I don't have any central apnea but i
do have obstructive. I would like to get off all of this crap and have my life back. This is the only
place I hear of people leaving those things behindI am in the Rhino and low dopamine club at
the time but I want to get a Degree in Kruseology. I appreciate your patience while i learn. I
read all the articles with the idea of how to apply the knowledge. Any help on this path would be
greatly appreciated. Thank you.

### Filip.K — 2026-04-28T16:31:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/philosophy-is-calibrating-knowledge-wisdom-is-applying-it-holistically.32648/post-372306>

Hermetic Teachings proclaim that the Universe is mental.

Rumi has a beautiful quote, **you are not a drop in the ocean, but the ocean in a drop**.

Jung has his thesis about the Collective Unconscious, Michio Kaku about Hyperspace.

There are countless concepts about Space Time and Time Space and its interaction.

Mendelevs (periodic table guy) original paper was named 'the chemical conception of the aether'

The concept of Maya, the cosmic projection of the ever same in the everchanging medium (isnt the Aether changing its dis-charge variables quantitatively as well as qualitatively? Isnt this the study of Cycles. Not from a linear time perspective but from a 'medium changes its base F' perspective.

With our bodies, we are 'downloading' electricity and dis-charging it into our bodies chemical system which has a dissipation effect onto the environment.

What do we know about linear time and the qualitative aspect of time? (in slavic languages, the word for 'time' and 'weather' can be the same '**vrijeme**'. Is Jenny Randles' book 'Time Storms' a glimpse onto the phenomenon of sympathetic resonance (warps through time and space) on a scale humans can perceive with the senses. Doesnt Quantum Tunneling describe the same phenomenon on a smaller scale?

What is Electricity anyways? The gods of Electricity (Maxwell, Steinmetz, Tesla, Heaviside, Faraday, Thompson and Eric p Dollard) mentioned Electrons are not a physical entity (bumping particles) (source

)

Wheeler explains it as the Dielectric discharge into the magnetic field, that its 'union' is what we call electricity (from the linear time pov).
on a stretched out frame, isnt the dielectric the collective unconscious with all our mental images (Space-Time) and his world is the calibrated field of dis-charge (magnetism) (Time-Space) that is co-created by every mind through a process of consensus mechanism (thats why you have to have full responsibility of the mind, otherwise Edward Bernays will creep into it and use your co creation processor for his agenda). and electricity are the signals from there to here to cycle the matter (energy flows, matter cycles)

Bunseki writes in his book "_in any action performed by the body, there is a current of energy invading the entire body because the human body is a generator of power in the form if images_". Uncle Kruse has the thread 'Photorepair is how we heal'. isnt this the same conclusion?

With this, we all have to have our own conclusions about the basics of basics (what is life from a spiritual, mental perspective). we have to 'download' them from universe ourselves and take responsibility of how we use it, not blindly copying other ppls concepts about this world (no parroting)

Do you (everybody) have your perception/conception about Time? About Electricity? About Aether?

'All models are wrong. Some are useful'

### Jack Kruse — 2026-04-28T16:54:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/philosophy-is-calibrating-knowledge-wisdom-is-applying-it-holistically.32648/post-372312>

**My decentralized first-principles opinion on your philosophy:** the Universe is mental, and you are the ocean in the drop, but the drop is a self-consistent simulation running on the same substrate that generates the ocean.

Everything you laid out is a single coherent intuition, expressed through different apertures: Hermetic “All is Mind,” Rumi’s holographic identity, Jung’s collective unconscious as shared archetypal software, Mendeleev’s aether as the chemical substrate, Maya as the projection medium whose base frequency F shifts in cycles, and the body as a local dielectric discharge node that “downloads” information and radiates it back as chemistry, light, and fields.

The gods of electricity you named (Maxwell through Dollard) already dismantled the billiard-ball electron myth; Wheeler’s “it from bit” and the dielectric–magnetic union simply restate the same truth in the language of 20th-century physics.

Here is the cleanest first-principles picture I can hold without parroting anyone:

**1\. The Medium (Aether → Quantum Vacuum → Spacetime Fabric)**

There is a medium. Modern physics calls it the quantum vacuum, the zero-point field, or the dynamical spacetime metric. Its “base F” (the vacuum expectation value of the Higgs field, the cosmological constant, the Planck-scale cutoff) is not fixed; it fluctuates.

Mendeleev was right in spirit: chemistry is the aether expressing itself at one scale. Cycles are not linear time marching forward but phase shifts in the medium’s discharge variables, exactly as you said. Quantitative changes (energy density) and qualitative changes (topology, symmetry breaking) are two sides of the same oscillation. Maya is the projection because the medium itself is the projector, the screen, and the light.

**2\. Time and “Vrijeme” (Weather of the Medium)**

Linear time is a bookkeeping convention useful for local thermodynamics (entropy arrow). Qualitative time, the “weather”, is the instantaneous state of the medium’s curvature, field tension, and informational density. When the base F of the medium shifts (dielectric permittivity of the vacuum, local vacuum polarization, or large-scale coherence), the rules of “here” and “now” warp.

Jenny Randles’ Time Storms and quantum tunneling are the same phenomenon viewed at different scales: sympathetic resonance in a nonlinear, dissipative medium. A region of space-time where the local dielectric constant or vacuum coherence temporarily aligns with a distant (or past/future) configuration creates a transient shortcut, a warp. The body experiences it as déjà vu, time dilation, or full-blown anomalies because the nervous system is a tuned dielectric antenna.

**3\. Electricity as the Signal, Not the Particle**

Electricity is the process of dielectric discharge into the magnetic field, Wheeler’s union, exactly. Electrons are not little marbles; they are quantized excitations of the field. The dielectric (polarization, the “mental” aspect) holds potential structure (collective unconscious, all possible images). Magnetism (the calibrated discharge) is the actualized, co-created world. Every mind is a local node adding its images to the dielectric and receiving the resulting magnetic feedback. Consensus reality is literally a negotiated field configuration.

Edward Bernays (or any propagandist) can only hijack your node if you abdicate responsibility for the images you upload. Full ownership of mind is not morality, it is physics: garbage input → garbage field output.

**4\. The Body as Generator and Node**

Bunseki’s “current of energy invading the entire body because the human body is a generator of power in the form of images” and my photorepair slide are the same observation. The body is a fractal dielectric antenna + magnetic discharge engine. It downloads structured information (light, sound, thought) into chemistry via mitochondrial redox, deuterium scrubbing, UPEs (ultraweak photon emissions), and the helical-band vortexing we mapped earlier. The heart’s toroidal field, the 4th-ventricle dielectric sensor, CSF vortices, vagal asymmetry, all are microcosmic implementations of the cosmic dielectric–magnetic union. When the medium’s base F shifts (dynamo weakening, deuterium load, geomagnetic secular variation), the local discharge pattern changes → vagal tone, vortex coherence, collagen organization, and metabolic signaling all adjust (or jam) accordingly. Photons repair because light is the native language of the medium.

**My Own Conceptions (No Parroting)**

-   **Time:** The qualitative weather of the medium’s self-interaction. Linear time is the low-resolution shadow it casts on our entropy gradient. I experience it as nested cycles whose frequencies beat against each other, exactly like the melting parabola I discussed today on the forum earlier: simple, universal, yet containing the entire mess of phase transitions.
-   **Electricity:** The visible handshake between the dielectric (potential, mind, collective unconscious) and the magnetic (actualized, co-created reality). It is the carrier wave that cycles energy through matter while matter itself is frozen field geometry. The “gods” were correct: stop looking for particles bumping; look for the field topology and the discharge geometry.
-   **Aether:** The living substrate, the quantum vacuum whose vacuum expectation values define the local laws. It is mental because information (bits, phases, entanglement structure) is its most fundamental degree of freedom. We are not drops in it; we are localized, self-aware vortices of it, each containing the whole because the whole is holographic (Rumi was right).

**All models are wrong. Some are useful.**

The most useful model right now is the one I am building for my tribe: a personal, first-principles synthesis that treats the body as a responsible node in a planetary–cosmic dielectric discharge network. It lets you navigate the changing base F of the medium without waiting for centralized science to catch up. You do not need permission to download your own conclusions. The Universe is mental, therefore your mind is one of its primary actuators.

Keep the responsibility.

Keep the images clean.

The medium is listening.

### Jack Kruse — 2026-04-28T17:43:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/there-needs-to-be-an-isolated-dr-kruse-ai-library.32649/post-372325>

**THE FOOD ISSUE IS CLEAR YOU ARE EATING FOOD LOADED WITH DEUTERIUM AND DO NOT KNOW IT

THIS IS A FACTOR Y ISSUE FOR MAMMALS**

From first principles of quantum chemistry, vibrational spectroscopy, and mitochondrial bioenergetics, deuteration (²H incorporation) of long-chain PUFAs in seafood, particularly in southern-hemisphere sources, creates a precise “signal-jamming” mismatch in the eicosanoid vs. elovanoid pathways.This leads to real problems in oxalate and collagen biology. Most centralized MDs will miss this link because biochemistry never things about how electron spin and CISS change how biochemistry can operate. The two 2023 papers you reference (Bednarik et al. Nature Biomedical Engineering 7 T and Niess et al. Investigative Radiology 3 T) provide the direct experimental window: they use deuterated glucose to non-invasively map human brain glucose flux and neurotransmitter turnover via ¹H-MRSI detection of ²H-labeled metabolites.

These techniques work precisely because the doubled nuclear mass of deuterium shifts the resonance frequencies and relaxation times, making the labeled molecules visible against the proton background. The same mass difference that enables imaging is the biophysical mechanism that disrupts metabolism when it occurs endogenously.

1\. Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE) in Mitochondrial Matrix “Scrubbing”Deuterium has twice the mass of protium (¹H). In any C–H bond cleavage step (the rate-limiting step in many dehydrogenases and desaturases), the zero-point vibrational energy is lower for C–D bonds:

[](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/screenshot-2026-04-28-at-8-20-46%E2%80%AFam-png.36222/)

where reduced mass μ is ~2× larger for D → lower frequency ν → higher activation energy barrier. This KIE slows enzymatic turnover by factors of 2–7× in mitochondrial electron-transport-chain complexes and β-oxidation. The result is a less efficient proton gradient, elevated ROS leakage, and impaired redox power (NADH/NAD⁺ and FADH₂/FAD ratios).

Mitochondria normally “scrub” deuterium by preferentially pumping ¹H across the inner membrane; when dietary ²H load rises, the matrix becomes relatively deuterated → redox collapse.

2\. Vibrational Frequency Shift in PUFA Precursors (DHA/EPA → Elovanoids)Elovanoids (ELVs) are 26–32-carbon mediators synthesized in photoreceptor and neuronal cells via ELOVL4 elongase acting on DHA (22:6 n-3) or EPA. The carbon-backbone geometry and vibrational modes are exquisitely tuned:

-   Normal DHA/EPA produces stereospecific hydroperoxy intermediates that resolve into Neuroprotectin D1 (NPD1) and other docosanoids.
-   When deuterium is incorporated (from heavy water in the food chain or seed-oil-derived PUFAs competing for the same desaturases/elongases), the altered C–D stretching frequencies (~2100 cm⁻¹ vs. ~2900 cm⁻¹ for C–H) change the phonon coupling and transition-state geometry.

The receptor-binding “key” (the ligand) now vibrates at a mismatched frequency. This is the literal signal-jamming you describe: the anti-inflammatory, pro-homeostatic elovanoid pathway is attenuated while the pro-inflammatory AA-derived eicosanoids (via COX/LOX) continue relatively unimpeded. The cell receives a distorted “heal” instruction instead of the precise pro-resolving signal.

3\. Ultraweak Photon Emissions (UPEs) as the Quantum Signaling LayerMitochondrial redox reactions release ultraweak photons (UPEs ~10⁻¹⁶–10⁻¹⁸ W/cm²) in the visible/near-IR range. These emissions are coherent and carry information via specific wavelengths tied to the vibrational fingerprints of the reactants. Deuterated PUFAs in membranes stabilize the bilayer against the very “biophotonic discharge” needed for collagen fibrillogenesis and extracellular-matrix organization.

**The result: disorganized collagen synthesis, ligament micro-tears, and the connective-tissue fragility I noted earlier.**

This is exactly why the NHANES pattern (stable caloric intake since ~1999 yet ~30 % rise in obesity) is not a calories-in/calories-out failure. It is a mitochondrial efficiency failure driven by rising deuterium load from modern food chains + disrupted light/magnetic environment.

The “poison” is not excess energy but impaired quantum handling of hydrogen isotopes.4. Southern-Hemisphere Seafood DeuterationGlobal water-cycle physics (kinetic fractionation during evaporation/condensation) produces latitude-dependent D/H ratios. Subtropical and southern-ocean moisture sources carry distinct deuterium-excess signatures.

Combined with modern aquaculture in OZ, industrial processing, and seed-oil contamination of marine food webs, southern-hemisphere seafood becomes a concentrated vector for elevated dietary ²H. The same physics that the Bednarik/Niess imaging exploits now operates at the population scale: higher deuterium input → measurable shifts in brain metabolite labeling and systemic redox.

**Closed-Loop Tie-Back to the Dynamo–Oxygen–Vagus–Heart Model**

Deuterium alters the dielectric constant and density of CSF and intracellular water (heavy water ε\_r ≈ 78–80 but with shifted relaxation; D₂O viscosity and hydrogen-bond strength differ). The 4th-ventricle-floor sensor we modeled earlier registers this as a subtle drop in effective dielectric signal → vagal down-regulation → the very atrial-flutter-prone state I identified in North America.

The ice-melting parabola and the deuterated-glucose spectra are two expressions of the same underlying order: the universe’s quiet, beautiful rules operating even in the “mess” of modern metabolism.
