Thank you very much for all the replies! Especially Dr. Kruse, thank you very much for your clear insights! We really appreciate this!

Before I could respond to all the comments, I’ve spent the whole week taking a deep dive into the subject matter.

It will be crucial that I understand the fundamentals myself first. Only then will I be able to ask appropriate, well-thought-out questions.
To get to the bottom of this, over the coming weeks I’m going to try to learn as much as I possibly can about the framework from the forum and from other sources by Dr Kruse. I need to be able to commit this to memory and understand it, so that I can challenge our current psychiatrist and neurologist. This will be my exam and their litmus test.

Over the past week, since your comments, I’ve been non-stop scouring the forum for further information on the topics discussed. In particular, the thread
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads...defines-how-systems-operate-in-humans.32507/#](https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-human-gps-system-defines-how-systems-operate-in-humans.32507/#) post-370589
and
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/understanding-vortices.32685/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/understanding-vortices.32685/) were incredibly informative sources.
I am slowly beginning to understand the components, and I can see the logic.

In the meantime, we’ve noticed that Mum remains very mentally unstable. She isn’t suicidal, but her state fluctuates enormously. This means that, whereas in a normal state she can handle difficult conversations, she can’t do so now. So I have to proceed strategically, including with her.

**SCANS TO ESTABLISH A BASELINE**
At the moment, it seems to me the wisest course of action is to arrange an MRI scan as soon as possible and take a blood sample. I can actually get her to agree to this. At present, we have no hard data on what is happening in her brain or body, so we need to carry out tests to determine her current condition. This will allow us to establish a baseline.

In doing so, we are looking for the following parameters:
\- Brain MRI's:
\> FLAIR = Looking for white matter hyperintensities
\> T1 = Brain atrophy, Pituitary (Empty Sella), Cerebral atrophy.
\> T2 = Ventricular size, perivascular spaces, brainstem signal around the 4th ventricle region
\> DWI = is this also needed?
I will contact the psychiatrist/GP this week to schedule the scans. I am curious to see how smoothly this will go (in the Netherlands), but I expect some resistance. What are the minimum tests you think we should carry out?

\- Blood tests:
\> Homocysteine – Methylation marker; elevated in B12/folate deficiency, linked to neurological damage and cardiovascular risk + CSF toxicity.
\> TMAO (trimethylamine N-oxide) - Elevated TMAO is linked to right vagus nerve dysfunction and gut dysbiosis. Mum’s oesophageal surgery and limited oral intake make gut axis function very uncertain.
\> hs-CRP (high-sensitivity C-reactive protein)
\> Nortriptyline blood level
\> Thyroid panel (TSH, free T3, free T4)

These are not all the parameters we are looking for, but I am trying to keep my post's concise. As soon as we have the results of the tests, I will of course post them here.

Lastly, would it be useful to also order a DDW Deuterium content test, or is it enough to look for increases in T2 relaxation times in MRI to confirm the Lattice Lock in mom?

**MUM’S DAILY ACTIONS SHE COULD TAKE FIRST TO DEFRAG:**

Jade & Salt protocol
\= GPS De-fragging. as Lattice Lock pre-clearance, to prevent Maillard-Orange flashover. As far as I have been able to understand, this works as follows, but please correct me on this!:
\- Drink 92.5ppm DDW + add 3% NaCl to the DDW water / inject via IV.
\- Questions: I have read that the 3% NaCl must be administered via IV; does this contradict drinking it? What is the correct method?
\> Crucial: When Mum drinks/eats, it goes down her throat, through the new oesophagus, directly into the small intestine. The stomach is completely bypassed. Is this a problem for drinking DDW? It doesn’t seem to me that this should be a problem?
\- We will do this before we start tapering any medication. We are not planning to make changes to her current medication, because we think we need to get her somewhat stable first.

Light + Circadian
For fixing the X-axis (Sphenoid/SCN). TTFL fix for 2AM insomnia. Choroid Plexus fractionation

Mastication
\> On gum, because she can only eat soft food (The hardest thing she can eat at the moment is mashed potato..)
For Y-axis, Meckel’s Cave dual exhaust, glymphatic deuterium clearance

Cold & Grounding
For FCHO1 neuroimmune bridge clearance; Z-axis torque restoration

30cm Copper Coil around the neck
Dr Kruse, regarding your latest comment in this thread about placing a 30cm copper coil around her neck as a sphenoid de-fragger, as much as I’d love to do this, I can’t quite persuade Mum to go along with it at the moment. I’m not a doctor, and I need to gain her trust before I take any more measures with her. I hope that with the scans and a proper analysis of them by us, we can convince her so that we can start exploring non-centralised approaches in more detail. You can just tell that Mum is desperate for a professional who will really help her, but I’m afraid we won’t find that here in the Netherlands. She is just begging for a bit of relief in her head.

**FINAL REMARKS**
I would like to ask you whether I am thinking along the right lines for now, as first small steps?

The bigger steps will follow later, once we have more precise data, when i know more about the framework, and I have been able to present the results of the scans to you.

In any case, I would like to make our intentions clear. Mum and Dad have always worked hard and have, luckily for us, substantial financial resources. So we’re open to all suggestions as to what we could do to help her get better. Buying DDW shouldn’t be a problem.
A trip to El Salvador would definitely be feasible; however, as a relatively new member, I’ll first need to earn my stripes, and show we are committed before I dare to ask for physical assistance from Dr Kruse or others.

Again, thank you all so much, and especially Dr. Kruse! Your messages gave me and my brother such a mental boost, to start taking the bull by the horns!

Sander, son of our dear mother Jacqueline

_(BTW i've bought the titanium membership a week ago, but it not yet seems te be administered in my profile, i will later check if this is some problem from my side)_

### FDDio — 2026-04-30T17:48:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/harnessing-electroculture-for-better-yields.32666/post-372647>

As I’ve been experimenting w Electroculture using old copper pipes in my gardens over the few years to improve yields, I never really understood the “why” it seemed to work. Now that I’ve come across [Jack’s post on the topic](https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jacks-journal-journey-2019-and-beyond.23037/page-24#post-372148), I have a better understanding—and of course, it has a lot to do with deuterium,which is inspiring me more to contine the practice.

The timing of the post is ideal, since I’ll be prepping my gardens soon. And this year I’m building another separate garden beside my existing garden up at my northern camp which should act as a good control, (since I have to admit I did not have a proper control garden for comparison over the last two years and would like to 'Verify').

Thus, I was wondering **if anyone else has been experimenting with electroculture techniques**, and if so, are you using copper pipes, galvanized wire, and/or magnets? I’m thinking using old copper pipes would be more effective because of their better durability and high conductivity, but they may be harder to find or more expensive than galvanized wire which was used in the video Jack posted. I also never used a magnet before so will look into that some more.

### Jack Kruse — 2026-05-01T19:17:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-has-the-magnetism-on-earth-weakened-and-could-it-go-back-to-what-it-was.32667/post-372746>

> [e s said:](/goto/post?id=372674)
>
> May be a stupid question but one I am interested in an answer to nonetheless

Wisest question anyone has asked today.

My short answer is: **We must keep the "Z-Axis" fed, or the "Y-Axis" will go dark.
THE DECENTRALIZED EXPLANANTION**

The SAA represents the mouth of the dynamo. And right now it is being forced to consume a bad diet. The SAA results from **"Isotopic Malnutrition"** of the planetary dynamo, in my opinion.

I’ve just identified that the **South Atlantic Anomaly (SAA)** isn't just a "weak spot"; it is a **Metabolic Deficiency** in the Earth's engine caused by the **Tectonic Consumption** of "mineral-depleted" crust.

In my framework, the **Dynamo** is a "Mitochondrial Piston" on a planetary scale. If the "plate" it is currently "eating" has been stripped of its polymetallic nodules (its **geobatteries**), the stator fails, the **Z-axis vortex** stalls, and you get the "Darkness" of the SAA.

**1\. The Tectonic "Feeding" of the Dynamo**

The Earth’s magnetic field is generated by the outer core, but it is **Inductively Coupled** to the mantle and the crust.

**The Consumption:** As the **South American and African plates** are "recycled" via subduction, they provide the "doping" for the convection currents of the outer core.

**The Missing Atoms:** If the crust being consumed under the South Atlantic was historically "starved" of cobalt, nickel, and manganese (the high-conductance geobattery atoms), the **Dielectric Constant** of the local dynamo drops.

**The Stall:** Without these atoms to act as the **"Spark Plugs"** for the planetary electrolysis, the **Z-axis**"slips." The field weakens (22,094 nT), and the SAA is born. It is a **"Lattice-Lock"** of the Earth's interior.

**2\. The SAA as a "Mineral Dead Zone"**

Here is my key point: the plates move.

**The Drift:** The SAA is drifting westward. This suggests that the **Core-Mantle Boundary (CMB)** under the South Atlantic is currently "digesting" a section of crust that is **Isotopically Heavy** and **Mineral Light.

The "Dark Oxygen" Link:** If the "Geobatteries" on the surface (the nodules) are the proof that electricity splits the water, then their **absence** in the "recycled" crust means the **Dynamo** has lost its ability to maintain the **"160 Dielectric"** of the local core.

**3\. The 540 MY Slide and the "Mineral Pulse"**

The **Cambrian Explosion** coincided with a massive increase in **Tectonic Activity** and "Mineralization."

**The Reboot:** The "pinning" of the dynamo 540 million years ago was likely triggered by the core "eating" a particularly **rich "dopant" layer** of the crust, which provided the torque needed to surge the **160THz signal** of the planet.

**The Reverse-Cambrian (Today):** We are now "eating" the leftovers. The "Current of Injury" in the South Atlantic is the result of the dynamo trying to run on **"Low-Octane" silt.

4\. Why Centralized Science Misses the Connection**

Geophysicists treat the plates as "rocks" and the dynamo as "molten iron." They ignore the **Solid-State Physics** of the interface.

**The Semiconductor Earth:** The mantle-core boundary is a **High-Pressure Semiconductor.** If you change the "doping" (the atoms in the plate), you change the **Band Gap** of the planetary engine.

**The SAA Flashover:** The SAA is a **"Dielectric Flashover"** of the Earth's interior because the "insulation" (the mineral balance) has failed.

**5\. The Decentralized Synthesis: The "Irony" of Mining**

This makes the mining of deep-sea nodules even more catastrophic.

**The Future Stall:** By stripping the ocean floor today, we are ensuring that in 50-100 million years, when _that_ crust is subducted, the **Dynamo will have another "Stall" event. I bet you did not know we are stripping the ocean beds for Elon Musk.**
The International Seabed Authority (ISA) has granted several [exploration contracts](https://isa.org.jm/exploration-contracts/exploration-areas/) specifically for the Atlantic, focusing on the Mid-Atlantic Ridge and regions extending from [South Africa toward South America](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/earth-science/articles/10.3389/feart.2016.00040/full). These areas are targeted for polymetallic nodules and cobalt-rich ferromanganese crusts, both of which are critical for [EV battery production](https://millerrecycling.com/ocean-floor-metals-electic-vehicle-battery/).
I found this out on my world cruise to South America and in Suriname specifically.
The connection between deep-sea mining and my "Isotopic Malnutrition" thesis finds support in three key areas:

**Tectonic Recycling & Depletion**: The [South Atlantic Anomaly](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/South_Atlantic_Anomaly) is geographically defined by a magnetic field strength below 32,000 nT. This weakening is tied to [chaotic iron flows](https://www.facebook.com/cbsphiladelphia/posts/a-weak-spot-in-the-earths-magnetic-field-is-growing-over-the-south-atlantic-ocea/1123803969896110/) at the [core-mantle boundary](https://svs.gsfc.nasa.gov/4840/), where the [subduction of mineral-rich plates](https://www.space.com/south-atlantic-anomaly-11-million-years.html) provides the "doping" for the planetary dynamo.

**The "Geobattery" Removal**: The discovery of [dark oxygen](https://www.facebook.com/techtimespage/posts/in-a-groundbreaking-discovery-researchers-have-found-that-polymetallic-nodulesme/663977569771318/) proves that these polymetallic nodulesfunction as natural [batteries](https://www.facebook.com/ShortsReels3/posts/scientists-confirm-oxygen-can-form-without-sunlight-or-plantsfor-a-long-time-sci/915367348066258/) that split water via [electrolysis](https://www.facebook.com/TheSpokesPersonPage/posts/-india-scientists-have-discovered-that-rocks-called-polymetallic-nodules-on-the-/790233706993539/). Removing these from exploration zones like the Mid-Atlantic Ridge essentially unplugs the local [dielectric rectifier](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Glycerol-3-phosphate_shuttle) of the planet.

**Industrial Alignment**: Companies like [The Metals Company](https://nonprofitquarterly.org/deep-rising-and-the-dark-price-of-powering-electric-vehicles/) and national agencies are aggressively pursuing these minerals to [meet the 500% increase](https://investors.metals.co/news-releases/news-release-details/ev-batteries-made-deep-sea-rocks-dramatically-reduce-carbon/) in mineral demand for green technology.
**HOW DUMB ARE MODERN CENTRALIZED HUMANS?**
This creates the **Biophysical Paradox**: we are [mining the nodules](https://www.science.org/content/article/prospect-unregulated-deep-sea-mining-looms-scientists-sound-alarm), the very oxygen generators and magnetic "dopants" of the deep, to build EV batteries that will eventually be recycled back into the mantle. As the SAA expands westward, it is "digesting" a section of the Atlantic crust that is being systematically [stripped of its magnetic gears](https://www.blueclimateinitiative.org/next-gen-batteries-eliminate-need-for-dsm). So if you buy a TESLA it is akin to supporting COVID jabs to me.

The SAA is a **"Magnetic Starvation Zone."** By harvesting the [polymetallic geobatteries](https://www.google.com/url?sa=i&source=web&rct=j&url=https://www.facebook.com/thesciencepulse/posts/scientists-have-discovered-that-polymetallic-nodulesmetal-rich-rocks-scattered-a/1136513975186303/&ved=2ahUKEwiChrLdu5iUAxXDGFkFHY5fMLoQy_kOegYIAQgJEAE&opi=89978449&cd&psig=AOvVaw16aT4mohl8WjUS0IMbmdhk&ust=1777737858152000), we are ensures the [dynamo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=az8KzgoE1Tw) lacks the [conductive atoms](https://oceanservice.noaa.gov/deep-seabed-mineral-resources/deep-seabed-mining/) to maintain the **Z-axis vortex of the planet. This means that the "Green Revolution" is physically engineering the next Magnetic Pole Reversal by starving the subduction engine.** This might create a the **"Planetary Out-of-Balance"** event. My hypothesis bridges the gap between **Hapgood’s Earth Crustal Displacement (ECDO)** theory and modern **Geodynamic Dynamo** physics.
If the Earth is a "spinning top," then removing mass (nodules) from the Atlantic and "re-stocking" it in subduction zones isn't just a chemical loss; it is a **Torque Imbalance** that can, hypothetically, trigger a [True Polar Wander (TPW)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/True_polar_wander) or a magnetic flip down the road. This is something Ethical Skeptic has talked about but not in relation to the oceans floor stripping of EV metals at the same time the magentic poles is losing ice.

**The Immediate Feedback:** But because of the **Inductive Coupling**, removing the geobatteries _now_ further weakens the **Universal Stator** today, accelerating the "Siberian Jerk."
**My Decentralized Conclusion:** The SAA is the **"Nutritional Scurvy" of the Planet.** The dynamo is "missing the key atoms" on the periodic table required to keep the **Z-axis vortex** coherent. We are watching a **"Topological Meltdown"** caused by 4 billion years of "Isotopic Silt" finally reaching the engine's intake.

### Jack Kruse — 2026-05-01T21:39:50+0300

This could flip the poles if we do enough of it. This is why anyone who buys an EV is an idiot. We need them to take COVID jabs to eliminate them.

### DavidL — 2026-05-01T22:16:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-has-the-magnetism-on-earth-weakened-and-could-it-go-back-to-what-it-was.32667/post-372767>

Damn...that's scary shit.

Here's a map I found from [CrowdMag](https://geomag.colorado.edu/crowdmag), a citizen science project that uses your mobile phone’s internal magnetometer to record magnetic data as you move. Anonymous data collected through the application can be used to detect magnetic anomalies caused by objects in the surrounding environment which help inform NOAA science.

[https://geomag.colorado.edu/crowdmag-tutorial](https://geomag.colorado.edu/crowdmag-tutorial)

You can see how f'd we are by the readings people are getting in cities...almost 90000 nT in a car? You expect readings in the 40-52000 nT. What sticks out to me is how artificial the fields humans created. I think back to reading Wallace's book now and I got it, but I get it more now...

I'm guessing the user who recorded the 90k nT was driving around in an electric car. The lower readings, I'm not sure what to think about that, other than it looks like a black hole for the magnetic field around the 23k nT....

### Anthony Smith — 2026-05-01T22:50:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-has-the-magnetism-on-earth-weakened-and-could-it-go-back-to-what-it-was.32667/post-372769>

> [David Limacher said:](/goto/post?id=372767)
>
> Damn...that's scary shit.
>
> Here's a map I found from [CrowdMag](https://geomag.colorado.edu/crowdmag), a citizen science project that uses your mobile phone’s internal magnetometer to record magnetic data as you move. Anonymous data collected through the application can be used to detect magnetic anomalies caused by objects in the surrounding environment which help inform NOAA science.
>
> [https://geomag.colorado.edu/crowdmag-tutorial](https://geomag.colorado.edu/crowdmag-tutorial)
>
> You can see how f'd we are by the readings people are getting in cities...almost 90000 nT in a car? You expect readings in the 40-52000 nT. What sticks out to me is how artificial the fields humans created. I think back to reading Wallace's book now and I got it, but I get it more now...
>
> I'm guessing the user who recorded the 90k nT was driving around in an electric car. The lower readings, I'm not sure what to think about that, other than it looks like a black hole for the magnetic field around the 23k nT....
>
> [View attachment 36357](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/36357/)

Several EV‘s I have measured had “low” magnetic fields while some ICE vehicles had high magnetic fields (from the placement of the alternator).
Driving down a street with overhead power lines can (will) produce very high magnetic readings in a vehicle
Also keep in mind moving through a magnetic field will produce a much higher reading than being stationary in one.

There is AC Magnetic field (from AC electric fields, power lines etc) . . . Bad
There is DC Magnetic field (Earths magnetic field, Magnetico pad) . . . Good
Magnetico 20 Gauss pad = 2,000,000 µT (nano Tesla)

So I found Dentagum ([https://www.faire.com/product/p\_9t5c2fvq4r](https://www.faire.com/product/p_9t5c2fvq4r)) which tastes very good, and has other things like coconut oil and hydroxyapatite that I have heard have positive benefits. However, it seems everything created to have some sort of benefit is nothing but a deuterium bomb. This option could work really well for me to chew it often, but stop me if it's not the right solution. (The advertising image of the dentist has him wearing sunglasses, so there's a huge red retard flag right on their website. I've attached a picture of the package with the full ingredient list.

# Thread: Heliotrope Rash
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/heliotrope-rash.32671/unread>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Evee — 2026-05-01T00:37:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/heliotrope-rash.32671/post-372685>

So I'm awaiting testing, but I have what looks to be a heliotrope rash, which is pretty indicative of dermatomyositis.

So clearly, I need to leave where I am, and taking long trips to Mexico and El Salvador has not been enough to offset living in the US.

Unfortunately, in the most immediate future, I'm going to have to do a lot of testing to rule out paraneoplastic syndrome which is associated with dermatomyositis.

But something is driving me crazy about how this disease is counseled. They tell people to stay out of the sun to avoid setting off an immune cascade. For the record, I will NOT stay out of the sun.
But I'm trying to understand, if inflammation is there because there's an antibody attacking something, it's not attacking ghosts, right? There must be some trigger?

So I understand in paraneoplastic syndrome, it's a response to the tumor, but for non-cancer dermatomyositis there still must be some trigger(s), no?

Some of markers they talk about are the same as mold (mmp9) so if Shoemaker can reverse an inflammatory cascade with a protocol or you can heal mold by renovating your melanin in a good environment, WHY wouldn't there be some way to reverse a cascade with this? Or am I thinking too simply?

I'm including a screenshot of the rationale they give for staying out of the sun. I don't know enough about how the immune system works to argue with that, I just know, following Uncle Jack's advice is the ONLY thing that has ever helped me. I felt the best I ever felt in Quintana Roo where I HEALED Hell's Itch on my shoulder (only other thing I did was a visit to an osteopath so maybe that helped too) but Hell's Itch is another thing they tell you not go in the sun with, but I got BETTER in the sun.

I'm sorry if these questions are dense, I was working like 7 days a week before all this started and I'm horribly behind on blogs, mostly following on the forum and podcasts. If there a blog series I should start back in with I will or I'll just pick a place and start.

### Mat.I — 2026-05-01T01:00:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/heliotrope-rash.32671/post-372687>

Read the mag declination / vagus exhaust threads. All linked to being clogged with Deterium, dielectric constant dropping and exhaust is blocked.

Focus on D depletion , unblocking the vagus exhaust and getting to a place that you are not being dueterated by. Your RPMs are dropping.

# Thread: New member living in kw
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-member-living-in-kw.32677/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### JoeNatural — 2026-05-02T16:24:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-member-living-in-kw.32677/post-372802>

Hello

Living on catameran in kw. Dec 2025 Ive started loosely applying kruse methods. I was already getting all the sun … sunrise.. sunsets, … bed early. Switched off my inverter on cat … bought blue blockers… saw results …just started making sense as i paired up my life past abundance, I lived 2000 to 2015 in xpuha - tulum in mx never realizing the cenotes… locations… benifits and one decisions after another seemed like i was luckiest mf ever to live. Meeting right folks right time . Hindsight … it pairs up w the sun in mornin, magnetic incline etc etc a phenomenal wave of folks in mx
I also spent a great deal of time in cuba, vzla , bvi!

Dr Kruse changed my next fase. I thought i was either gonna get a cacao farm if in vzla 2-5 hectare or something in Santa Marta…..keep the small adventure cat off yhe coast vzla depending on politicsl shake out. Now that magnetic declination has reached abc …. ????

Love love Guatamala … the folks … gorgeous lands … flowers

Mainly here to find practical answers snd simple proticols of everyday living. Just the last 5 months , the info from vids and x has open my eyes! Saved my life !

I fear Jack ! In a good way. The weak will betray u. Im here in all humility and of whatever service i can add value to this forum. I speak fluent street spanish… i m a face reader … micro expressions ( mac fulfer my mentor) . I know parts of vzla and Habana like the back of my hand.

J

# Thread: Your Centralized MDs
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/your-centralized-mds.32679/>
**Subforum:** Educating Doctors
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2026-05-02T18:34:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/your-centralized-mds.32679/post-372807>

The year is 1950. Your centralized MD lights a cigarette and tells you smoking is fine. He read it in a study. He is telling the truth about having read it. He does not know, or is not saying, that the study was funded by the tobacco industry.

The year is 1958. Your centralized MD tells you to eat less fat. The evidence is contested. The contestation is not in the public messaging. The food industry has been helpful in clarifying which findings deserve attention. Some researchers who published contradictory data have been quietly defunded. Ancel Keys is on the cover of Time magazine.

The year is 1962. Your centralized MD gives thalidomide to your pregnant wife for morning sickness. It has been approved. The FDA gave it the green light in Europe. Twelve thousand children will be born with severe limb malformations before anyone in an official capacity acknowledges the problem. The families are told the drug was safe. The drug was approved. Both of these things remain true.

The year is 1972. Your centralized MD prescribes Valium. Britain is in the grip of a benzodiazepine wave that will last two decades. The dependency risk is known internally. It is not shared. Your doctor is not lying to you. He was not told either.

The year is 1999. Your centralized MD prescribes Vioxx for your arthritis. It is newer than ibuprofen, well-tolerated, and Merck has a study showing it works. Merck also has internal data suggesting it roughly doubles the risk of heart attack. This data will not reach your doctor for four more years. Fifty thousand people are estimated to have died in the interim. Merck eventually settles for 4.85 billion dollars. No criminal charges are brought.

The year is 2002. Your centralized MD prescribes OxyContin. Purdue Pharma trained its sales representatives to tell doctors the addiction risk was less than one percent. That figure came from a letter, not a study. The letter was about patients with terminal cancer on short-term doses in hospital settings. Your doctor is a GP with a patient who has a bad back. Nobody draws a distinction. Nobody is required to.

The year is 2008. Your centralized MD checks your cholesterol. Your LDL is elevated. You are prescribed a statin. Nobody mentions that the number needed to treat for primary prevention is approximately 250. Nobody mentions that the muscle deterioration you'll notice over the next two years is listed as a rare side effect rather than a documented pattern affecting a meaningful percentage of patients. The trial that informed the prescription was funded by the manufacturer. N

ow it is today. Your centralized MD has new guidelines. New studies. New consensus. He is confident. He has always been confident. The confidence has never been the problem. The confidence is, in fact, precisely the problem.

Source: COVID19 VACCINE VICTIMS AND FAMILIES.

### Jenelle — 2026-05-02T19:03:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/your-centralized-mds.32679/post-372808>

I am currently listening to the lecture series: **"The Pharmaceutical Industry: Practices, Incentives, & Patient Awareness"** on Peterson Academy.

This series was originally named: **"The Secrets of Big Pharma: How to Be a Better Patient"**.

I don't know what happened that made them change the title - but I can guess.

I am currently on lecture 6 out of 8, and it is _outstanding_. There are many people I do not enjoy listening to, at all - but Gerald Posner does an amazing job of presenting in this series what is LONG overdue. You can tell he is passionate about this subject, and I fucking love that.

Thanks for sharing, Jack!

Hello from Northeast Tennessee,

I am looking forward to my first monthly call in May.

My haplogroup is H1a1. I’ve done searches and realize it gives a bit more flexibility in environments. I wasn’t able to find deeper information in my searches of the blogs and forums.

I currently live in Northeast Tennessee. I’ve lived in Massachusetts, Nevada, South Carolina, England, Netherlands and Argentina. I’ve travelled extensively to many other places globally.

I’m 57 and retired - (military veteran (computer programmer), BS chemical engineer (technical- basic physics, electrical, civil, mechanical engineering classes required in addition to core degree, classes), MBA (business leadership, data analytics, supply chain, procurement leadership, sustainability), psychology (spiral dynamics - beliefs tied to body chemistry and brain patterns).

I said no to the COVID vaccine.

I was adopted as a baby, grew up in a family with Northern dad and mom who was from Japan. I was exposed to a wide variety of cultures in key developmental phases.

I just bought a tiny string bikini to get a much sun as possible when I am in places that I can’t be nude. I have carried extra weight on and off over the years. Through a series of experiences and reflections, I started searching to learn from mitochondria experts. Watching what’s happening since COVID and how people are changing has also added to my research and inquiring outside the typical channels.

In addition to Jack’s blog, his two books, the blogs and forums - I’ve read the Monk who sold his Ferrari. The concepts were a great refresher. I’ve just received the Robert Becker’s The Body Electric and started reading it.

My takeaway in addition to following the leptin Rx - read/study, journal, daily reflection, and curiosity since I am a N of 1. These are messages from other valued mentors during my life journey. I’ve been a fan of system thinking for a large period of time and that leads to different perspectives (for example, environment matters).

My partner also said no to vacccine and is trained in acupressure, cranial sacral, myofascial release, etc.

**2\. The Isotopic Load (D+): The Great Alluvial Flood Plain**

**The "Heavy" Water Table:** Low-lying river valleys and broad alluvial floodplains accumulate runoff from massive drainage basins. **The Equation Impact:** Because the water table in this area sits heavily in the "78 dielectric" zone of bulk, saturated river water rather than highly excluded water, the **Isotopic Load (D+)** in the local food and water chain is elevated. The "statistical distance" between deuterium collisions shrinks, forcing the mitochondria into constant "stutter." This is why people in NOLA and Baton Rouge feel the River give people cancer. They are not wrong. It is an effect of deuterium collection.

**3\. Solar Flux (S) vs. The H Haplotype**
At latitudes ranging from roughly 35N (Memphis) to 38.5N (St. Louis), you are in a temperate zone with highly variable seasonal solar subsidies.

**The Winter Gap:** For an **H haplotype** (like yours), winters in the midwest feature low UV-A and UV-B. When the solar flux (S) drops in the winter, the engine loses the torque required to centrifuge the local alluvial deuterium load out of the system.

**The Summer Surge:** In the summer, the sun is intense enough to charge your melanin antenna, but the ambient electromagnetic noise from the fault line means your system operates in a perpetual state of "alert."

# Thread: Newish silver member
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/newish-silver-member.32689/unread>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### WvMts — 2026-05-03T19:41:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/newish-silver-member.32689/post-372923>

Been lurking awhile. Figured I better post something about myself and say hi. So much to learn. Raised outside of Philly ( don't hold it against me, lol) currently in WV. I've done ultrasound since1995 but moved in 2000 to rural WV because I hated the city and always wanted to homestead. When you scan someone you are alone with them in the dark ( with only a blue light screen smh..) but its like a confessional and people tell you all sorts of things . At the time I was a cardiac tech so the scans took awhile.. #1 was the regret they didn't do what they really wanted to do and put off things for retirement. But then found they were too sick to do any of them. So I took their advice and moved to try and do what I was more passionate about. So I've been here for 26 yrs and never regretted moving. We raise our own grassfed beef and chicken and can garden. We have a well . I still work in ultrasound but I've cut my hours back dramatically because I know that environment is literally killing me but it pays the bills. Now learning about the magnetic declination I feel like it's year 2000 again, but I'm older and not so brave. I renewed my passport and I want to visit El Salvador to at least see for myself what it's like and if I think my pale gringo ass could make it work. Having a bunch of livestock and critters does make even taking a vacation complicated but I'm determined to figure something out. I am thankful to have this forum to learn from. Hopefully I can contribute more eventually, but right now I am still riding the short bus on most things so I'm reading as much as I can.


══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Hello everyone, I’ve come across numerous anecdotes where those with Parkinson’s have stated that they noticed their PD symptoms were greatly diminished while on doxycycline. My question here is do you believe the effects of doxycycline on PD are purely from a gut microbiome effect, or is there something more going on perhaps on the quantum or biophysics front? There is currently a trial going on in Australia where PD patients are being given either Doxycycline, or Ambroxol (a mucolytic agent that acts as a GCase enhancer that would increase lysosomal activity in the degradation of misfolded alpha synuclein) or both therapies in combination. At the risk of being called a retard, I would love to have uncle jack’s take on this!

Thanks

# Thread: CRADLE CAP = JAUNDICE?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cradle-cap-jaundice.32694/unread>
**Subforum:** Optimal Kids
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2026-05-04T04:05:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cradle-cap-jaundice.32694/post-372980>

**IS CRADLE CAP A SYMPTOM LIKE JAUNDICE IS, LEADING TO HIGHER HETEROPLAMSY LEVEL?**

Children with cradle cap suffer from more metabolic problems later in life pointing out why this is not a temporary mothering hormone issue that centralized science tries to sell to MDs.

My observation highlights a critical pivot in how we understand chronic, systemic diseases. The argument is that if cradle cap (infantile seborrheic dermatitis) were merely a transient reaction to maternal hormones, it would not correlate with **long-term metabolic dysfunction** later in life.
While the standard centralized medical model focuses on the local, temporary symptom (excess oil and yeast), the perspective of quantum biology and bio-energetics argues that the skin is merely the outward map of internal mitochondrial efficiency and "isotopic tax."

_The Conventional Medical View sold to parents is as follows......_
In standard dermatology, cradle cap is known as **infantile seborrheic dermatitis**.
**The Mechanism:** It is a self-limiting condition characterized by yellowish, greasy plaques and scales on the scalp.
**The Clinical Cause:** It is primarily attributed to maternal hormones crossing the placenta before birth. These hormones temporarily hyperactivate the infant's sebaceous (oil) glands.
**The Microbiome Role:** The excess sebum acts as a lipid-rich feeding ground for commensal skin fungi, specifically _Malassezia_. The inflammatory response to the fungal byproducts causes hyperkeratosis (the sticking together of dead skin cells).
_The Quantum Biology / "Deuterium Burden" Hypothesis of Kruse_

The perspective I've presented operates on the premise that disease and cellular dysfunction are problems of **sub-molecular physics and energy transfer** rather than just genetic hardwiring or hormonal shifts.
If we apply this specific framework to cradle cap, the hypothesis would be structured as follows:

**The Follicle as an Energy Sink:** As I've noted many times before, hair follicles and their associated sebaceous glands are highly active "clones" demanding immense metabolic energy to fuel continuous cellular turnover.

**The Mitochondrial Stutter:** In my decentralized framework, mitochondria function as nano-motors. At the center of the ATP synthase motor is a rotating axle propelled by hydrogen ions (protium). Because deuterium is twice the mass of normal hydrogen, its presence in the mitochondrial matrix can physically damage or "stutter" the motor.

**The Singlet Trap & Apoptosis:** High local concentrations of deuterium within the rapidly dividing follicular cells would reduce the efficiency of the electron transport chain. This causes electron leakage, creates reactive oxygen species (the "singlet trap" heat/entropy), triggers inflammation, and interrupts normal cellular desquamation (shedding).

Here is an analysis of why viewing cradle cap as an early marker of metabolic/deuterium stress, rather than a simple hormonal fluke, that holds weight under my framework.

**1\. The Statistical Link to Metabolic Syndrome**
In adult populations, severe or chronic seborrheic dermatitis is directly recognized as an external marker for **metabolic syndrome**, characterized by abdominal obesity, hypertension, low HDL cholesterol, and systemic insulin resistance.

**The Shared Inflammatory Cascade:** Both metabolic syndrome and seborrheic dermatitis share elevated levels of inflammatory cytokines like TNF-alpha and IL-6.

**The Clinical Leap:** If an infant presents with an inflammatory, hyper-seborrheic reaction on the scalp, centralized medicine assumes it is isolated. However, from a systems-biology view, it indicates a highly active, high-turnover tissue (the follicle) that is struggling to properly manage lipid synthesis and cellular shedding right from the start of life.

**2\. The Transgenerational Deuterium & Lipid Connection**

If we apply my quantum biology model, the reason an infant with cradle cap develops metabolic problems later is because they inherited a compromised "deuterated engine."

**Lipid Synthesis as a Deuterium Trap:** Subcutaneous fat and sebum are supposed to act as protective "sinks" for deuterium. When a cell creates saturated fats, it is heavily dependent on metabolic water and precise hydrogen routing. If a mother passes down a high deuterium burden, the fetal cells are forced to build cellular machinery using heavy hydrogen D+.

**The Mitochondrial Stutter and Insulin Resistance:** As I noted previously, the presence of deuterium destroys the rotational speed of the ATP-synthase nano-motors in the mitochondria. When the cell cannot make energy efficiently, it enters a state of chronic redox failure. To protect itself from further massive oxidative damage (the singlet trap of entropy), the cell downregulates insulin receptors. This is the exact biophysical origin of insulin resistance, which eventually manifests as type II diabetes and obesity later in life. Deuterium causes it.

**3\. Epigenetic Imprinting vs. Temporary Hormones**

The traditional "maternal hormone" theory fails to explain why some children develop long-term metabolic issues while others do not. My transgenerational epigenetic model fills that gap:

**The Fetal Programming Phenomenon:** It is well-documented in epigenetics that maternal stress, maternal diet, and the uterine environment "program" the fetus's metabolic set-point (thrifty phenotype hypothesis).

**Base Chain Methylation:** If the developing fetus is flooded with deuterium and low-quality environmental inputs, DNA methylation cues are altered. The genes required for lipid metabolism and mitochondrial repair are silenced or poorly expressed. The cradle cap is simply the very first clinical signal that this child's body is operating under high entropy and poor energy mechanics.

**Bridging to a Solution**
If cradle cap is the "canary in the coal mine" for a life of metabolic struggle due to an early epigenetic/isotopic tax, the focus should not be on scrubbing the scalp with anti-fungal soaps. Instead, it would focus on **lowering the systemic deuterium burden** and restoring mitochondrial redox potential.

**SUMMARY

Transgenerational Epigenetics:** Under my thesis, if the mother has a high systemic deuterium burden (from modern 155 ppm water, heavy processed carbohydrate consumption, or lack of sunlight or magnetic decline), that heavy isotope profile is passed directly to the developing fetus's germline and cellular architecture. The infant is born already facing a compromised redox potential.

My thesis provides a highly detailed mechanical explanation for how environmental "isotopic taxes" could impact high-turnover tissues, there are distinct differences between the behaviors of cradle cap and chronic alopecia (hair loss). In adult hair loss, follicles undergo miniaturization and permanent hibernation due to chronic energy failure or androgenic sensitivity. Cradle cap, however, was once believed to be a **temporary, localized surge in oil production** followed by scaling. It typically resolves entirely within the first year of life as maternal hormones clear the system. We now know that is a ridiculous idea. We now know cradle cap is driven strictly by a permanent transgenerational epigenetic or high-deuterium burden because the condition leads to chronic diseases as the infant continues its life. Cradle cap is Seborrheic dermatitis and that disease leads to metabolic syndrome in these kids due to methylation changes of deuteration.

Not surprisingly, our child conceived by two metabolic “deuterium bombs,” developed both mild neonatal jaundice (never treated with lights) and cradle cap. Seen through Jack’s lens, those early signs look like the first visible expression of her FCHO1 genetic mutation with inherited redox stress and isotopic burden, not random infant quirks from ‘_maternal hormones crossing the placenta before birth._’ She then had ongoing scalp flaking and dandruff, which now looking back, only cleared/minimized after she started IVIG and later on, implementing Jack’s mitochondrial health protocols and drinking DDW. As a clear n=1 story, her case fits Jack’s prediction that early skin signals can reflect underlying mitochondrial damage from day one.

# Thread: Idea for lowering DDW cost with urine therapy
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/idea-for-lowering-ddw-cost-with-urine-therapy.32699/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 12
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### josephine — 2026-05-05T05:47:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/idea-for-lowering-ddw-cost-with-urine-therapy.32699/post-373083>

I’m exploring ways to reduce the cost of drinking DDW using a modified approach based on a UT protocol.

My idea is to use Preventa 25 (in oz) and dilute it with my spring water (145 ppm) to make 1 litre at around 70 ppm to drink daily. After 4–5 days, I would begin “looping” my urine, while continuing to use the 145 ppm water for things like coffee.

My thinking is that with this approach, I might be able to reduce my reliance on purchased DDW and supplement the difference through looping.

Bit like the baby does in utero, but not as intense.

I realise this may not be ideal for obvious reasons, but I’m wondering—are there any specific reasons why this approach wouldn’t work?

This is info I found on the Litewater site:
Based on the context provided, the time it takes for deuterium (D) levels in the body to decrease after consuming deuterium-depleted water (DDW) can vary. However, some insights can be drawn from the information: 1. \*\*Initial Decrease in D Concentration\*\*: The context mentions a 68-year-old male who consumed DDW with 105 ppm D concentration. There was a rapid decrease in D concentration in the exhaled breath condensate (EBC) within the first 4 to 5 days, with an additional decrease over the following days. This suggests that the initial response to DDW consumption can be relatively quick, with noticeable changes within a few days. 2. \*\*Equilibrium Reached\*\*: For the same individual, the D concentration reached equilibrium within three weeks, and no additional decrease was observed after this period. This implies that while initial changes can occur quickly, a more stable state of deuterium depletion in the body might take a few weeks to establish. 3. \*\*Significant Changes Within Half a Day\*\*: The context also explores whether significant changes in deuterium concentration can be observed within half a day after ingesting DDW with 25 ppm D concentration. While specific results from this part of the study are not detailed in the context, it suggests that researchers are investigating rapid changes, indicating that some effects might be observable in a very short time frame. 4. \*\*Recommended Duration for Fertility Enhancement\*\*: For achieving significant deuterium depletion and optimizing fertility outcomes, a protocol of consuming DDW for a minimum of 90 days is recommended. This extended duration allows for a gradual reduction of deuterium levels, enhancing mitochondrial health and improving fertility. In summary, while initial decreases in deuterium levels in the body might be observed within days, a more comprehensive depletion and equilibrium might take a few weeks. For specific applications like fertility enhancement, a 90-day protocol is recommended to achieve optimal results. The exact time it takes for urine to be deuterium-depleted is not explicitly mentioned, but the general trends suggest a gradual process over weeks.

Sources:
1\. Reference 1
2\. Reference 2
3\. Reference 3
4\. Reference 4
5\. Reference 5

However, some insights can be drawn from the information: 1. \*\*Initial Decrease in D Concentration\*\*: The context mentions a 68-year-old male who consumed DDW with 105 ppm D concentration. There was a rapid decrease in D concentration in the exhaled breath condensate (EBC) within the first 4 to 5 days, with an additional decrease over the following days. This suggests that the initial response to DDW consumption can be relatively quick, with noticeable changes within a few days. 2. \*\*Equilibrium Reached\*\*: For the same individual, the D concentration reached equilibrium within three weeks, and no additional decrease was observed after this period. This implies that while initial changes can occur quickly, a more stable state of deuterium depletion in the body might take a few weeks to establish. 3. \*\*Significant Changes Within Half a Day\*\*: The context also explores whether significant changes in deuterium concentration can be observed within half a day after ingesting DDW with 25 ppm D concentration. While specific results from this part of the study are not detailed in the context, it suggests that researchers are investigating rapid changes, indicating that some effects might be observable in a very short time frame. 4. \*\*Recommended Duration for Fertility Enhancement\*\*: For achieving significant deuterium depletion and optimizing fertility outcomes, a protocol of consuming DDW for a minimum of 90 days is recommended. This extended duration allows for a gradual reduction of deuterium levels, enhancing mitochondrial health and improving fertility. In summary, while initial decreases in deuterium levels in the body might be observed within days, a more comprehensive depletion and equilibrium might take a few weeks. For specific applications like fertility enhancement, a 90-day protocol is recommended to achieve optimal results. The exact time it takes for urine to be deuterium-depleted is not explicitly mentioned, but the general trends suggest a gradual process over weeks.
>
> Sources:
> 1\. Reference 1
> 2\. Reference 2
> 3\. Reference 3
> 4\. Reference 4
> 5\. Reference 5

If you corss the border, you can buy Peridot which is 137ppm and pH 8,5 for 1-1,25€/1,5 L bottle ( available at DM, Spar, Ecofamily). As for DDW - Qlarivia (Romania) is much cheaper than Preventa (Hungary). Tinnitus has many reasons: GERD, blood sugar, histamine, nerves/brain, nnEMF - in sum, its light, water, magnetism.
As long as it is recurring, you have a chance to fix it. As it gets permanent, no way back.

### Millerstef — 2026-05-06T23:04:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/feeling-better-already.32707/post-373242>

I am a lifelong searcher for methods that can heal me. Always had trouble sleeping and had a very large intramuscular lipoma removed from my hamstring at 30. After having my first child at 32 and never getting enough sleep, I developed brain fog, symptoms of low thyroid but numbers are in range, low vitamin D, low cholesterol, slightly elevated bilirubin, low end for lymphocytes and arrythmias (even passed out a few times through the years) however heart appears perfectly normal when wearing holter monitor or having ekg, or ultrasound. I have tried every "natural" protocol under the sun and at times it seemed like I was on the right track. My supplement closet is insane. I started implementing some of Jack's protocols April 25th. I started to drink DDW at 2 to 1 ratio, spend as much time as I can with my feet on the ground in my yard and as weather permits wearing a bathing suit. I'm not able to catch most sunrises as it's quite early in Portland, Oregon but I get out with my feet on the ground as soon as the kids have breakfast and lunches packed. I have been outside for every sunset since the 25th. I have significantly cut down on my phone and screen time and am trying very hard to not use it for frivolous activities. I started chewing mastic gum, singing, humming, using my vibration plate daily, liberally applying dmso to my head in hopes of breaking up the lattice and jumping on the rebounder. I am eating some type of fish or crustacean 1 time a day and maybe even for a snack. Luckily I don't have a job that requires me to be on screens all day. My biggest improvement right now is I was having terrible brain fog and head pressure and my tinnitus that was triggered by a double ear infection about 5 years ago was increasing from very mild to more frequent. My head is feeling so much better, like a weight has been removed and my tinnitus is also getting better. I am excited to keep learning and implement all that I can on a daily basis. I'd love any feedback or tips people might like sharing aside from moving especially if you have delt with any of this and what works best for you.

Based on my framework, the link between the **Andes virus (Hantavirus)** deaths and the **South Atlantic Anomaly (SAA)** can be broken down as a Factor Y event as follows:

**1\. The Dielectric Constraint (The Environment)**
From a first-principles perspective, a virus is a specialized piece of genetic code encased in a protein shell. It relies entirely on the **dielectric constant (\\(k\\))** of its host's intracellular water to maintain the structural integrity and "electronic coherence" of its replication machinery.

**The SAA Effect:** The cruise ship was traveling through the South Atlantic Anomaly, a region where the geomagnetic dipole is at its weakest. **The Transition:** In a weakened field, the hydration shells of proteins lose their organization. This "thickens" the dielectric medium, effectively increasing the metabolic cost for any organism (host or virus) to maintain a functional band gap.

**2\. Viral Mutation as a "Topological Filter" Response**

If the planetary dielectric constant is dropping, life must adapt to the "noise" or face ossification.

Under first principles, this shift in transmission vector suggests a mutation designed to optimize "electron flow" in a high-CO2/low-field environment. If the "ambient" environment (the air/water on the ship) is electromagnetically compromised, the virus adapts by moving directly between the highly regulated, "shielded" dielectric environments of human bodies rather than relying on an external environmental stage.

**3\. Ubiquitin and the "Short-Circuit" (The Host)**

When the passengers entered the SAA, their internal **Ubiquitin** systems were already under stress from the global CO2/dielectric shift I've described.

**Band Gap Failure:** In the SAA, the "dielectric noise" peaks. If Ubiquitin is the "Band Gap Monitor," it begins marking the host's own respiratory proteins for destruction because they can no longer maintain coherent electronic flow in the "isotopically polluted" water of the SAA.

**The Viral Opportunity:** This creates a **metabolic energy void**. The Hantavirus, which specifically targets the vascular endothelium and lungs—exploits this "short circuit." The host’s immune response (the "cytokine storm" typical of hantavirus) is effectively a massive, uncontrolled discharge of energy (thermal and electronic) by a biological computer that can no longer "mark" and clear the "metabolic exhaust" fast enough.

**4\. The "Area-Specific" Link**
The deaths on the _MV Hondius_ represent a **confluence of four physical stressors**:

1.  **Global:** The "loading" of the atmosphere with CO2, dropping the planetary dielectric constant.
2.  **Regional:** The SAA’s weakened magnetic shield, which further degrades the "Magnetic Torque" needed for atomic fractionation.

4.  **Local Electromagnetic:** The addition of **nnEMF** (non-native electromagnetic fields) as the **4th stressor** completes the physical circuit. From a first-principles perspective, this isn't just an "environmental factor", it is the **high-frequency trigger** that collapses the cell’s remaining dielectric stability.

**_Here is how the ship’s nnEMF environment interacts with the Planetary KIE to explain the cruise ship deaths:_

5\. The nnEMF-Insulin-Deuterium Connection**

As I've noted, the Volkow (2011) study demonstrated that cell phone-level EMFs increase glucose metabolism in the brain. In my framework, this is a **dielectric emergency response**.

**The Glucose Spike:** nnEMF acts as a "de-structuring" force on the hydration shell of cells. To compensate for the loss of coherent electronic flow, the body floods the blood with glucose.
**The Isotopic Trap:** This glucose is the vehicle for **Deuterium**. High blood sugar is effectively high-deuterium fuel. When this fuel enters the mitochondria, it bypasses the normal fractionation filters that a strong geomagnetic field would usually support.

**6\. The Poisoning of Cytochrome I NADH ---> NADD+**

At the subatomic level, the "hardware failure" occurs at **Complex I (NADH Dehydrogenase)**.

**NADD+ Formation:** Under the stress of the ship’s radar and Wi-Fi (nnEMF), the H- (hydride) needed for the respiratory chain is replaced by D- (deuteride). The result is NADD+.

**Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE):** Because Deuterium is twice as heavy as Hydrogen, the "tunnelling" speed of electrons through Cytochrome I slows down significantly (6-10x slower). This is the **"ossification"** I mentioned. The "band gap" in the respiratory semiconductor widens, and the engine stalls.

**7\. Cortisol as a "Dielectric Scream"**

The massive release of cortisol observed in these acute Hantavirus cases is the body’s last-ditch effort to "prime the pump."

**Isotopic Stress Response:** The brain senses the stalling of the electronic flow at Complex I. It triggers the adrenal glands to dump more glucose (more D+) into the system to try and "force" the current through the circuit.

**The Hantavirus Catalyst:** The Andes virus specifically targets the **vascular endothelium,** the very "wires" of this electromagnetic system. If the endothelium is already "leaking" dielectric energy due to the (NADD+) poisoning and the ship’s nnEMF, the virus doesn't just infect; it causes a **total system ground-out** (the rapid pulmonary edema and death). That is the reality of what happened. I did not have enought time to lay this case out to Emerald on TV today but I do have time to tell you here.

**8\. The SAA as the "Low-Voltage" Background**

The **South Atlantic Anomaly** provides the "low-field" background that makes this possible. Without the "Magnetic Torque" of a strong dynamo, the passengers' bodies had no external "tuning fork" to help fractionate the (D) being pushed into their cells by the ship’s nnEMF.

**Summary of the 4-Stressor Feedback Loop:**

1.  **Global:** CO2 rise drops the planetary dielectric constant.
2.  **Regional (SAA):** Weakened dipole reduces the "torque" for atomic fractionation.
3.  **Local (nnEMF):** Ship's electronics trigger the (NADD+) drive the Glucose-Cortisol stress response.
4.  **Biological (Virus):** The Andes strain exploits the resulting "short-circuit" in the vascular "hardware."

**DISCUSSION FROM THE EMERALD ROBINSON INTERVIEW**

The inclusion of **POMC** (Proopiomelanocortin) and **Melanin** as the "Quantum Gatekeeper" provides the final physical mechanism for the **MV Hondius**fatalities. From a first-principles perspective, this identifies the specific "hardware failure" in the passengers' ability to buffer the transition from a geomagnetic-led system to an nnEMF-led one.

**9\. The POMC-Vascular Link**
The embryological migration of POMC with neural crest cells along elastin and fibrillin establishes the **biochemical-to-electromagnetic interface** of the vascular system.

**The Hardware:** POMC is the precursor to α-MSH, which regulates melanin. If the vascular "wiring" (elastin/fibrillin) is the path, then POMC is the signal processor embedded within the "insulation."

**The SAA Failure:** In the South Atlantic Anomaly, the lack of external magnetic "torque" means the POMC-derived peptides can no longer maintain the "spin coherence" of the electrons moving through the vascular endothelium. This makes the vessels topologically "unprotected."

**10\. Melanin as the Solid-State Buffer**
I’ve defined melanin here not as a pigment, but as a **topological shield**.

**Spin Management:** As a stable free radical and semiconductor, melanin's primary role is to "quench" the noise of nnEMF and high-D+ environments. It acts as a **spin-filter**, ensuring that only the correct "phase" of electron flow reaches the Inner Mitochondrial Membrane (IMM).

**11\. The Hantavirus as the "Renormalization" Event**

In this state, the Andes virus acts as the **"Symmetry Enforcer"** at the biological level.
**Topological Collapse:** When melanin fails to buffer the ship's nnEMF, the "Band Gap" in the vascular endothelium widens. The virus doesn't "cause" the death so much as it **accelerates the renormalization**.

In my view, the _MV Hondius_ deaths represent a **localized failure of the Melanin Buffer**. ### Pete Collins — 2026-05-08T03:18:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cruise-hantavirus.32709/post-373397>

Outline: Non-Exhaustive Sampling > US Government Grants.

For: 'Hantavirus' related research.
From: US National Institute of Health / US National Institute of Allergy & Infectious Disease.

1\. 2021 Grant: "Viral and host determinants of susceptibility of diverse hantaviruses".
\* Award Number: 5R21AI156482-03.
\* Institution: Rohit K. Jangra (Assistant Professor), Louisiana State University Health Sciences Center Shreveport.
\* Period: June 1, 2021 – May 31, 2025
\* 2022 funding: $186,390.
\* Summary: Develop tools (e.g., recombinant vesicular stomatitis viruses displaying hantavirus glycoproteins) to study virus entry and replication for >40 genetically diverse hantaviruses.

2\. 2017 Grant: "A human monoclonal antibody therapy for treatment of hantavirus cardiopulmonary syndrome".
\* Award Number: 5R42AI132047-05.
\* Institution: Joana M. Murad (Celdara Medical, LLC, Lebanon, NH), in collaboration with Jason Botten (University of Vermont).
\* Period: August 8, 2017 – February 28, 2026
\* 2025 funding: $955,865.
\* Summary: Develop potent human neutralizing monoclonal antibodies (isolated from patients) as a first-line antiviral for HCPS caused by Andes virus (ANDV) and related hantaviruses like Sin Nombre virus (SNV). Address person-to-person transmission risk and bioterrorism potential.

3\. 2020 Grant: "Mechanisms of Intrinsic Host Responses to Hantavirus Infection".
\* Award Number: 5K22AI141680-02.
\* Institution: Alison Kell (Assistant Professor), University of New Mexico Health Sciences Center.
\* Period: February 14, 2020 – April 30, 2022.
\* 2021 funding: $106,320.
\* Summary: Examines innate antiviral signaling (e.g., MAVS/type I interferon) and virus-host interactions in human endothelial cells vs. rodent reservoirs for Old World hantaviruses like Hantaan (HTNV) and Seoul (SEOV) viruses.

4\. 2017 Grant: "Therapeutic antibodies for treatment of hantavirus cardiopulmonary syndrome".
\* Award Number: 3R41AI132047-01S1.
\* Institution: Jason W. Botten (Celdara Medical, LLC, in collaboration with University of Vermont).
\* Period: 2017 onward.
\* 2018 funding: $54,079.
\* Summary: Fund development of human neutralizing monoclonal antibodies isolated from survivors as a first-line therapeutic/prophylactic for hantavirus cardiopulmonary syndrome (HCPS) caused by Andes virus (ANDV) and related strains like Sin Nombre virus (SNV). Address ~40% fatality, rodent reservoirs, and rare person-to-person transmission.

5\. 2019 Grant: "Prometheus Center for Excellence in Translational Research; multi-project center grant".
\* Total Award (umbrella'd across several individualized grant numbers): $22 million over 5 years.
\* Institution: Albert Einstein College of Medicine (Kartik Chandran, Ph.D., lead), with international consortium partners including U.S. Army Medical Research Institute of Infectious Diseases
\* Period: 2019 onward.
\* Summary: Large-scale translational effort to develop monoclonal antibody-based therapies against Andes virus (ANDV), Sin Nombre virus (SNV), Puumala virus (PUUV), and Crimean-Congo hemorrhagic fever virus (CCHFV). Focused on Category A priority pathogens with high lethality and biodefense potential. Funded antibody discovery, preclinical testing, and advancement toward clinical use. Direct multi-million-dollar NIAID transfer to Einstein and collaborators for collaborative, high-impact countermeasure development. Related investigator grants (e.g., R01 AI132633) support foundational hantavirus entry/glycoprotein work by same lab.

6\. 2024 Grant: "PROVIDENT--Prepositioning Optimized Strategies for Vaccines and Immunotherapeutics against Diverse Emerging Infectious Threats".
\* Award Number: 1U19AI181977-01
\* Institution: Kartik Chandran, Ph.D. (Albert Einstein College of Medicine, Bronx, NY)
\* Period: 2024–2029 (5 years)
\* Funding: $14 million per year (NIAID direct award to institution)
\* Summary: Hantaviridae as a core virus family focus. Multiple integrated projects centered on hantaviruses using Andes virus as the primary prototype. Project 1 studies virus-host interactions and pathogenetic mechanisms of Andes virus. Project 2 designs optimized vaccine antigens for hantaviruses. Project 3 develops rapid-response RNA vaccine strategies for hantaviruses. Project 4 mines human antibody responses to inform vaccine and therapeutic mAb design against hantaviruses.

Is the University of Texas an unwitting cog in a premeditated biological terrorism event?

# Thread: New titanium member

### ZacMerriken — 2026-05-07T02:22:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-titanium-member.32711/post-373254>

For the last two years I’ve been dealing with screen-induced vestibular migraine/central vestibulo-ocular dysfunction: nausea, right-eye/sinus throbbing, and nystagmus/visual instability that worsens dramatically with fast scrolling or reading on computer/phone screens, and driving winding roads.

ENT workup has been normal: VNG, caloric testing, hearing tests, and CT imaging did not show peripheral inner-ear damage or BPPV. That makes me think this is less of a classic labyrinth/BPPV issue and more of a central vestibulo-ocular / trigeminal / migraine-type pathway problem.

After reading CPC #87 on the Mayan jade inlays, I started thinking about my response to yellow-tinted Syntonic glasses differently. I don’t want to overstate the optics (just started using them), but shifting/filtering the screen spectrum with these glasses has made a striking difference. Screen-induced nausea is now minimal, and last week was the first time in two years I had almost no screen-triggered symptoms. My guess is that Syntonics Yellow lenses are likely not literally converting screen blue light into 530 nm green light. Maybe they filter the short-wavelength blue/violet spike from the screen and leaving a warmer red/green/yellow-weighted spectrum? Also to note, regular blue light blocking glasses haven't helped my case in terms of nausea reduction when on screens.

Reading and slow screen movement are fine now, but fast scrolling still triggers nausea. If I do start to get nausea or right-eye pain, staring at a white computer screen through the yellow lenses calms the vestibular migraine pattern within 5–10 minutes taking away all nausea and eye pain, when usually it would take all day for me to recover.

My current thinking— and I’d love correction if I’m misreading Jack’s newer blogs — is that screens are exposing an X-axis/sphenoid-switchboard issue rather than just a classic vestibular problem. The way I’m reading Jack’s newer blogs, screens may be exposing an X-axis/SCN timing problem plus an EOM/cavernous sinus/Meckel’s cave drainage problem. Blue light/nnEMF is the environmental stressor, but D+/deuterium in the CSF/water lattice seems to be what makes the pump cavitate instead of clear. Fast scrolling and winding roads then become a stress test for the trigeminal/vestibulo-ocular system. The yellow lenses feel like a temporary optical workaround because they reduce the blue spike and make screen input less provocative.

Brief history:

-   2018: acute vertigo with nystagmus, improved after 2–3 months of vestibular PT.
-   2021: long COVID, bedridden for about a year, improved dramatically with ozone and therapeutic phlebotomy for high ferritin.
-   2022–now: recurrent vestibular episodes. Earlier episodes resolved with PT, but this current 24-month episode has been the most stubborn despite consistent vestibular therapy.
-   Microclot testing improved from stage 4/4 to 2/4 with Zeta Aid within 1 month; heparin did not seem to move the needle.
-   tinnitus for 20 seconds 2-3 times per month. Usually it feels like my hearing goes out in 1 ear before the tinnitus ringing starts.
-   Left-eye macular hole treated with laser.
-   Binocular vision diagnosis: was given prism glasses that cured this current "vestibular migraine" where I could use screens normal again for 2 months but the glasses stopped working and full symptoms came back.
-   History of staph sinus infection/sinusitis, with CT showing significant right-sided sinus inflammation under the right eye, which makes me wonder whether local inflammation around the trigeminal/sinus/cavernous region could be contributing.
-   Bad acid reflux/gerd. Was unable to eat meat which would lead to being up all night with gerd. Prolotherapy, mastic gum, and VNS has healed this problem. Now I'm able to eat meat again. I haven't had acid reflux in a month.

Exercise, especially trail running, now improves symptoms, which is the opposite of earlier vertigo episodes. When I avoid screens and winding drives, I feel about 95% normal vestibular-wise. Screens remain the clearest trigger.

Current protocols: Epi-Paleo diet, daily grounding, sunrise/midday sun + sunset, DDW, VNS TENS stimulation, no screens and mastic gum.

I’m curious whether interventions like neural therapy, prolotherapy, or DMSO in specific regions (my sinuses or cranial nerves) make sense in my specific case and if I should get thermography done first to make sure. My current thinking is that vision/vestibular PT may be useful later as a re-loading stimulus, but only after the light/water/magnetism inputs, REM/saccadic pump, and vagal exhaust are working better. Otherwise I may just be training on top of a deuterium-locked, low-dielectric system that cannot hold the signal. And that's why vestibular/vision therapy isn't currently helping me.

Appreciate any and all feedback/insights.

has dropped due to the "heavy" deuterated water table, the oxygen simply cannot "fall" into the cell. The patient is **suffocating in a sea of oxygen.** This is why they are "tired, anxious, and foggy", because their brain is in a localized Warburg Shift.

This is the same "melanin-degradation" pathway I've discussed at length. The body is trying to break down its own pigments into catecholamines (Dopamine/NE) just to keep the "dazed" brain awake.

**DISCUSSION**

You’ve just exposed the "Keto-Adaptation" trap. Most people view keto as a macronutrient hack, but you’ve correctly identified it as a **dielectric power-grid hack.**

Here is the first-principles breakdown of why the Vitamin K bolus (the shot) contradicts the "hardware requirements" of a newborn:

**1\. The Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE) & Glutathione**
The slides highlights that the placenta and mammary glands **concentrate and slowly release MK-4**.

**The Detox Trap:** Converting Vitamin K1 or synthetic K variants into MK-4 requires the intermediate **menadione**. This process is a "metabolic tax" that consumes **glutathione**. Not good.

**The Isotopic Stress:** Glutathione is the primary defense against **Deuterium** and oxidative stress. By forcing a massive bolus of K1 into a neonate, medicine triggers a "glutathione drain." This is what acetomenphen does to adults. This is especially concerning when a kid gets a jab fever and the pediatrician tells mom to give the kid tylenol. It is psychotic the adivce that become evidence based when you understand Physics > Pharma is the lesson of the Wisest. In a high-D environment (like a modern nnEMF-heavy hospital), this drain leaves the infant’s **cytochromes unprotected** from isotopic poisoning.

**2\. The "Bolus vs. Leak" (The Dielectric Gate)**

Nature’s "slow leak" of MK-4 is a **topological necessity**.

**The MK-4 Shield:** MK-4 is the specific "mammalian hardware" required for carboxylation and the regulation of calcium (a key signaling ion).

**The "Short Circuit":** A massive bolus dose is a "high-voltage" event for a "low-voltage" system. If the baby’s detoxification system (the "software") isn't fully online, the sudden surge of menadione and the subsequent glutathione depletion create a **biophysical blackout**. This "ossification" of early neural pathways is exactly what I have linked to developmental issues like autism in Quantum Engineering #45.

**3\. The Evolutionary "Antithesis"**

The centralized medical assumption that babies are "born deficient" is a misunderstanding of **nature's rate-limiting step**.

**The Placental Filter:** The placenta isn't failing to transport K; it is **actively filtering the frequency** of its delivery. It prefers MK-4 because it’s already "pre-processed" mammalian hardware that doesn't require the toxic menadione bypass.

**The Modern Mismatch:** As I've noted, modern diets are low in K2 (MK-4), but the centralized solution, a high-dose synthetic K1 injection, ignores the **topological insulator** (the placenta's logic). It forces a "Phase 1" metabolic event in a system designed only for "Phase 2" assimilation.

**My Decentralized Summary: The Hardware Solution**
My conclusion is to be wise Mom needs to focus on **maternal MK-4 loading pre-pregnancy and intrapregnancy** (through diet) respects the **Placental/Mammary Gatekeeper**. It allows the mother's more robust biophysical "fab plant" to handle the isotopic fractionation and menadione conversion, delivering only the "clean" MK-4 semiconductor to the baby at a coherent, "low-noise" rate.

**DISCUSSION**

This post pinpoints the **"Systemic Ground-Out"** that defines the modern centralized pediatric experience. By applying first-principles physics, we can see that the medical "standard of care" is effectively a series of high-frequency stressors that dismantle the infant’s dielectric shield during the most critical period of "hardware" assembly.

**1\. The Vitamin K Shot as the "Initial Surge"**
In the hospital environment, saturated with **nnEMF** from monitors, Wi-Fi, and LED lighting, the infant is already struggling to maintain a coherent water table.

**The Multiplier:** The K1 bolus forces the liver into an immediate, high-energy metabolic bypass (conversion to MK-4 via menadione).

**Glutathione Depletion:** This "clears the deck" of glutathione. From a physics perspective, glutathione is the **proton-donor** that maintains the redox potential of the cell. Without it, the cytochromes are left naked against the "illegal mass" of **Deuterium** and the oscillating interference of nnEMF.

**2\. The Tylenol (Acetaminophen) "Short-Circuit"**

The standard advice to use Tylenol for "fever management" after the jab schedule is, biophysically catastrophic.

**Thermal Regulation:** Fever is the body’s attempt to increase the **dielectric constant (_k_)** and speed up enzymatic repair through infrared (heat) emission. Fever's are a hypothalamic de-frag operation and Rockefeller medicine wants it interrupted as soon as possible to sell more products.

**The NAPQI Blow:** Tylenol’s metabolite, NAPQI, is a "glutathione sponge." It doesn't just lower fever; it **extinguishes the pilot light** of the mitochondria. In an infant already drained by the K1 shot and facing 72+ antigenic "software updates," the Tylenol removes the last remaining buffer.

**3\. The Result: "Isotopic Ossification"**

When the glutathione is gone and the nnEMF noise is high, the infant's **Topological Insulator** (the Inner Mitochondrial Membrane) fails.

**The NADD+ Shift:** Instead of NADH, the respiratory chain begins using NADD+ This heavy hydrogen (D) slows down the ATP synthase "motor."

**Brain Failure:** The brain, being the most dielectric-intensive organ, cannot handle this "ossification." The result is a failure of synaptic pruning and myelination, the "blackout" we call neurodevelopmental delay or autism.

**4\. Physics > Pharma: The "Wise" Path**
A "magnetic excursion" requires **higher magnetic coherence**, not more chemical interference.

**The Mother's Role:** Nature intended the mother to be the "Fab Plant." She processes the K1into (MK-4), filters the (D) through her own metabolism, and delivers a **"Quantum-Clean"** fuel through breast milk.

**The Rejection:** Rejecting the bolus-dose paradigm in favor of maternal loading is the only way to respect the **Biochemical Lagrangian** of the infant.
**SUMMARY
Given these boundary conditions, this is why I see the Vitamin K shot as a "nnEMF-multiplier" that further destabilizes the baby's already-stressed dielectric water table in a hospital setting. When you add this shot to the 72 jab schedule it is no wonder little brains fail to develop post natally in a magnetic excursion. We need to be advocating for doing everything right, not advocating half assed ideas.**
We are indeed in a **Topological Race**. Centralized medicine is trying to solve a hardware problem with flawed software patches, while the real solution lies in restoring the dielectric integrity of the "biological computer" from day one.

# Thread: Vitamin K Jabs In Hospital At Birth?  HARD PASS
